name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Mace=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Campaign Volunteer Opportunities - Nancy Mace for Congress
body:
Help Congresswoman Nancy Mace defeat a tough Democrat challenger to keep this seat in Republican hands this November! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2706b9521306/sign-up-to-volunteer-for-nancy-maces-2022-campaign-9001571?e=ddc57b5ede)
---
| |
---
| |
# Sign Up to Volunteer for My 2022 Campaign

Good afternoon from the Lowcountry! We just passed our first big deadline with incredible strength, and now we're entering the **last 10 weeks** of the primary.

We are building a team of rock star volunteers and would love your help - it'll be fun too, we promise!

My Democrat opponent is raising money right and left to try and take this seat back from Republican hands - we have no time to waste! To win a majority in the House we **must keep this seat in Republican hands.**

We need as many** ** fiscally conservative leaders on Capitol Hill as we can get - and you know that _no one will work harder_.

You can help make this happen!

All our **[volunteers will get](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=309f057047&e=ddc57b5ede)** :
* FREE Campaign t-shirt and bumper sticker
* Exclusive campaign event invitations
* Opportunity to earn additional **[Rockstar Volunteer Awards](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=f1f791d73f&e=ddc57b5ede)**

My campaign manager Austin says the first 10 volunteers get a selfie!

With your support, we will defend this seat and win a Republican majority in the House, where I will continue to be a strong voice for our values.

---
| [Sign Up Today!](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=7b0b9c732c&e=ddc57b5ede "Sign Up Today!")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Mullin?=
subject: THANK YOU, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=31a89201b8&e=292fde286a)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

I’ve learned much of what I know about governing from Jackie Speier. When she endorsed my candidacy, she entrusted me to carry on a legacy of public service. Part of that legacy is remaining humble and grateful for every action our voters take to support us.

Your generosity over the last 48 hours has put us in a position to succeed and has demonstrated your trust in me to represent you. For that, I am eternally grateful.

It’s clear that our campaign is building sustained momentum across the Peninsula, and we’re now in a stronger position than ever to win this race, **because of you.**

When I get to D.C., I promise I won't forget the overwhelming support that you’ve shown me. We set an ambitious target for our end-of-quarter donation drive, and not only did we hit it— we exceeded it!

It is an honor to have you as part of Team Mullin. Together, we can deliver on the promise of a brighter future for all of us. **[If you’d like to continue your support and help keep the Mull-mentum going, click here.](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=3bb75d8758&e=292fde286a)**

With gratitude, Kevin Mullin

name: Jesse Jensen
subject: Can you help me recover?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress
body:

name: NRSC Chairman
subject: Democrats want to impeach Clarence Thomas

body:

body:
Help Rob qualify for the ballot by signing his designating petition | | |
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/35b3a58e1115/sign-rob-astorinos-petition?e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| | **I need your help. **Kathy Hochul has been a disaster for New York and we Republicans have a real chance to win in November, as recent polling shows - but ONLY if we nominate the right candidate. You can take the first step in replacing Hochul with a real conservative Republican by signing my designating petition

**Below are several signing locations and dates/times over the next few days where and when you can sign.** If you don't see a location near you, it's likely we've already been in your area. However, if you have a public location we can use in your area, please reply to this email with your contact information and my team will be in touch. Similarly, if you'd be willing to the collect signatures of your Republican family and friends reply to this email with your name and address/phone and my team will also send you a list of Republicans in your neighborhood.

Thank you!

Rob

***

subject: Stop the CDC 🛑
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7ccbe0e5c6db472b80763fb5b056ae4a&_e=FiVbqk9c3munCa9oZG9uK3MSbZQzkGt1uWeK0SGT53xvKjsbBeBtabpPxWJFt7s4OtXAlprqzylWLgusFRBxzHe1FJug7ywy5HdNoouT_Bh5OorVpJL20Z0nwYh8pYgU5PSrVHwYvr1kAm1mXOQl5uhWGIoGrfN6cg4BYW9XtiHxRjgRF4dgjqWTFn_KHYFKGkMsbchgq1X2FSMkeiF8Iun9VJYUo3YIbYv8XSiHDQ8dDUXXVZSozKVPlFlS4EZDyLLid4K45D7WVd4F9_iTzolPFaU70CoEAHfE6b7dJIiVLOediYdXetFBH_ei5KrquKSg3Qj3uOUaqSHp5hjPeeNC2938rTgjMst-ZXn40dRREdSQP0g9broRos4vvo1EX23hB5qXQKGWp_neyWhW1g%3D%3D) | |
---
**Stop the CDC 🛑
**
A new Republican [report](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7ccbe0e5c6db472b80763fb5b056ae4a&_e=FiVbqk9c3munCa9oZG9uK9bKpRAzS5iLycn0d_YJ5DhCmAFar1vLolHrrrk_9ckZDWyVv6vXDbsy6V4G4YAuBnkPfXmhYNsF12YDQjv0UsnW7MjyhdIFIj2sc6YXQGMfdOpM2K2B7nbkvfITQ0D_ZQJv3aLibIOTgnThuLF4guB251dqzfDdaIv1I2Y3c-0jWovLLL3lcgL3WqecAEofhYwwK6MJHnjizJ_QImTyLpG6QvBATi3pG7rflK-GR3wF7y-13FeyCDQp8_A3aE22zp_LErJdQ6zH0k_oq4cHOd46q8iX3VriOqXXQk8wYpd90L9Onl8_NYlznkAPRUOgVYCVR3GBNPWaBKuLLotKoxQ%3D) revealed this week that the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) [conspired](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7ccbe0e5c6db472b80763fb5b056ae4a&_e=FiVbqk9c3munCa9oZG9uKwyUkwWfdYpaxDqC2EWpO7tRfM5ov__BtMiUYqGlIQHSW6Vi4WFD2tLSx_gidiKXDKPuG_wvQk4hnDFOyYCbzq5zs_GG4ryjE2t8uG7Ue7tfU6AdQSzCzTDedBfcgp3UKyX3dmXFoKaava5QR8vRtCLhnXcONmztzzNCsWEMV9lOnwXEE3-G2kwl5xl9gUkUUwAV-54gvBvwbLpLjTJAgEL0y7qV7Livz4cv7h8uIRIbWWVZzuJWLc_qOtssueK50aiBR-aHDFQMYKwjmqE43iiZLHUESXNmLsN9Cr5SiNCVnyJwqkfpcW_BowdTlz1rUdVcFbPEMBOEHIq6q8I_tcg%3D) with the nation's largest teachers unions on when to reopen our schools.

Surprised?

I'm not.

For too long, the government has allowed the CDC to run buck wild, giving them far [too much power](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7ccbe0e5c6db472b80763fb5b056ae4a&_e=FiVbqk9c3munCa9oZG9uK2AY6sDkW8trmYlHRb9Euz5miHNixw_MYqHr0SNSsUO6k_mb7pfD-bNjS8QhOgk4fbXp5aUXXotf8dqwVsm-9cBPTauzGFTHKnxmZ-Uk0EeLFVPIV7bv-8-EegpQ74cIZZn1DMeQnArGvro-XNlQ_aIxbnLS6VBE0P8E7hCUrshtHn5iR5plvO6WhB7iSb4cM56QkzY76LrC_Kxy6u4h-S7S0-jFfcYNX7O7vMBUDQ_-oLXgv1Osn8T8dBgazyUPGETwOQOznJYCetUK66eLzN43kZtMttgtcEIH6Ce9X4aFgw0SMhpmhEqucfsjsp4FMB_4XVPFbPNRvf3MDz94E_7BNUIypyM5kGdDEULyLVmNY_HMrraeka5JVBr6n0pusg%3D%3D) with little to no oversight.

For two years, we were told: “follow the science.” Well, that’s a heap of rotten baloney. Under the Biden administration, the CDC wasn’t concerned with science but with placating their special-interests friends on the Left. Remember when the “science” [suddenly changed](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7ccbe0e5c6db472b80763fb5b056ae4a&_e=FiVbqk9c3munCa9oZG9uK-3QjCSt0GZU_kCUyjTajiqA3UH_wfOT1-YOlrY9g1fREO1hH9WMssJS3OuY2sTV8fTH1bzh1rp6tiO15LTkdcAd62xVt53CjJuH8yuH84iWqEXnF5uKny5iMxxTjKaR57LmALxSIRDFsDVnXTS0xDk4sCIx1gUvL_633wv2BFtyZjgsQtMqhmL8aWNKBhhbvg3K9teJLo2SHQd_pIMYpjBVqz53rjDYimfprWffA3CYyrddcG7zLzv7r7xEJjzCPeynXObSlBe_ZYP7s28qJv3wi-EyDWNpdruTNj3CYWGKSXwktz9JDET50pXsSZ6HI38Rue5M90AlX5vWBuCvduj1_22iJRI9_7yKjhFPzWfeRgIIjFxNfIcjwfFAmLqhZQ%3D%3D) and it was okay not to wear a mask? Funny how the “science” coincided with Democrats’ sinking poll numbers.

After two grueling years of living under the CDC's heavy thumb, it's time to push back. The pandemic tyranny has to stop. The time is now to [reopen our schools](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7ccbe0e5c6db472b80763fb5b056ae4a&_e=FiVbqk9c3munCa9oZG9uKzxBIv5UMIGIbUAjtXqBSPfQcnpoGoqytZUKEG-AZHz78rKaHaf-a6R1IBX72GHauoy9YBtBXa9q2Xavt0-q167oZ5HpiRjy28CwBZkrea2L4Qr-qRO2xVpBPmP5mobTB56WABvb6sHAPTFgWZZ6hhxrzKGqcSTj0QtN-464v1sU-AfI_RL1f6GjmjNzRPhMxx6SsV3NywgfeFnNkXLMW7kvfaNnjcdDInmk4vu7E47k-CmWi9xNSi2UVEpXhbSKM6k0Lanw46JzC70Cveae5yfh0kDEdenPbMlGRlG129yF) and call for an investigation of the CDC.
|
---
**Welcome To Knoxville 🇺🇸**

Surprised? I'm not. For too long, the government has allowed the CDC to run buck wild, giving them far with little to no oversight. For two years, we were told: “follow the science.” Well, that’s a heap of rotten baloney. Under the Biden administration, the CDC wasn’t concerned with science but with placating their special-interests friends on the Left. Remember when the “science” and it was okay not to wear a mask? Funny how the “science” coincided with Democrats’ sinking poll numbers. After two grueling years of living under the CDC's heavy thumb, it's time to push back. The pandemic tyranny has to stop. The time is now to and call for an investigation of the CDC. | Welcome To Knoxville 🇺🇸 Image courtesy of Knox News Former UN Ambassador Nikki Haley and actor Denis Quaid are to Knoxville! Why? They have been named the award recipients for the upcoming Medal of Honor Celebration happening right here in our community. **So we need 30,000 Democrats to respond IMMEDIATELY and help us confirm widespread grassroots support for Judge Jackson!** [**DO YOU APPROVE OF JUDGE KETANJI BROWN JACKSON?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/KBJ_Approval/?source=VPP_20220401_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=1685%2E878179%2ERkXlUz) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/KBJ_Approval/?source=VPP_20220401_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=1685%2E878179%2ERkXlUz) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/KBJ_Approval/?source=VPP_20220401_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=1685%2E878179%2ERkXlUz)

subject: Some personal news...
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=f6564bbe3b&u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1494bf9122)
---
| | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | |
---
## Personal news...
This fall I’ll be adding a weekly hosting gig, a little hint: I’ve been there before. But don’t worry I’ll still be on _Spicer & Co_ every night.
| [Click for the news](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ae4e53d4a2&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | | | | |
---
## The media is looking out for Kamala...
This week the _LA Times_ put out this piece “[Vice President Kamala Harris, in her toughest hour, is keeping a tighter circle](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=2cbbf65d39&e=f6564bbe3b).” It’s embarrassing that this passes as journalism — this is a puff piece on a miserably failing politician. You have to watch this clip of her this week:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3519026823&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | | | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Inside Hunter Biden’s multimillion-dollar deals with a Chinese energy company](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e79da25504&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The Washington Post[Fed’s record on beating inflation marked by failure](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3b016c304a&e=f6564bbe3b) — via PoliticoGet ready: 8/9, thats the Fed’s record on triggering a recession while trying to fix inflation. [Prosecutors Advance Tax Probe of Hunter Biden](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=43595b434d&e=f6564bbe3b) — via WSJ [Bank records show Hunter Biden received $100,00 in 2017 from Chinese firm](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=61651e4436&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Washington TimesDay 260 that ABC, NBC News, or CBS have not uttered “Hunter Biden” — what story will eventually break that streak? This one? [Senate confirmation hearing ‘outrageous and beyond the pale.’ Booker says](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9f2406af7a&e=f6564bbe3b) — via PoliticoAmazing to watch all of the Senate Dems complain about the SCOTUS confirmation circus they created. In a normal world, the press would call them on it. [Blinken to meet UAE leader in Morocco to shore up ties ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5ea28e1021&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Reuters First question: did you guys get our voicemail?
| | | | | | |
---
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=cfaf7c6fc1&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9d43ec6963&e=f6564bbe3b)

name: Patty McCloskey
subject: This is not good
body:
[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyskydy-bjututkitk-r/) Friends, Last night, I told my husband - Mark McCloskey - that I would help him reach his 1st quarter financial goal, but with the deadline passing last night, _he didn 't make up his deficit. _I'm pretty upset that we weren't able to help him, so I told him that I would reach out one more time to try to make up the deficit ASAP. **We need to raise another $955 today. **[**Would you please consider helping**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyskydy-bjututkitk-y/)[**?**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyskydy-bjututkitk-j/) [DONATE $955](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyskydy-bjututkitk-t/) [DONATE $500](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyskydy-bjututkitk-i/) [DONATE $250](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyskydy-bjututkitk-d/) **If those numbers are too much to ask, I completely understand. A donation of even just **[**$10**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyskydy-bjututkitk-h/)**or**[**$20**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyskydy-bjututkitk-o/)**would be huge to lift our spirits!** My husband isn't a politician, so this campaign has not been the most natural for him, but he is a patriot who loves our country deeply and would do anything to fight for it. And, when the woke mob attacked our neighborhood, he knew he had to do more to stop them from unraveling our country. That's why he's in this race, so if that sounds like someone you'd like to support, will you please help us today? [DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN AFFORD](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyskydy-bjututkitk-b/) Thank you in advance,Patty McCloskey [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyskydy-bjututkitk-n/)[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyskydy-bjututkitk-p/)[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyskydy-bjututkitk-x/) | [McCloskeyforM](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyskydy-bjututkitk-c/)[issouri](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyskydy-bjututkitk-q/) | 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335, Saint Louis, MO 63108[Unsubscribe](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-u-tyskydy-bjututkitk-a/) [Preferences](https://markmccloskeyformissouri.updatemyprofile.com/r-tyskydy-9A790A88-bjututkitk-f) | [Unsubscribe](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-u-tyskydy-bjututkitk-z/)

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: This is bad. Really bad.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | Patriot, It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60014129:6WNe91oNW:m:1:3299561967:9551460FE642F4085FD52DC7CDC06C06:r)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60014129:6WNe91oNW:m:1:3299561967:9551460FE642F4085FD52DC7CDC06C06:r "Generic Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60014129:6WNe91oNW:m:1:3299561967:9551460FE642F4085FD52DC7CDC06C06:r "Can I count on you
to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the
fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60014129:6WNe91oNW:m:1:3299561967:9551460FE642F4085FD52DC7CDC06C06:r "BUT, if every
patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in
the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60014129:6WNe91oNW:m:1:3299561967:9551460FE642F4085FD52DC7CDC06C06:r "Generic Button")
---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you, Patriot.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60014129:6WNe91oNW:m:1:3299561967:9551460FE642F4085FD52DC7CDC06C06:r "I can’t
extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45
min.")**

Thank you,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60014129:6WNe91oNW:m:1:3299561967:9551460FE642F4085FD52DC7CDC06C06:r)
---
Dan Crenshaw

---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60014130:6WNe91oNW:m:1:3299561967:9551460FE642F4085FD52DC7CDC06C06:r "Red Wave Image
Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60014130:6WNe91oNW:m:1:3299561967:9551460FE642F4085FD52DC7CDC06C06:r "Can we count on you to step up?")**

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Outrage Over Survival Food
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|
# Outrage Over Survival Food
According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages.Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".**As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis.It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food.Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore.Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores.That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.).Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# Last Time, Their Best-Selling 3-Month Kits _Sold Out_ Completely In Just 4 Days... Today They Have Them Back In Stock!
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**Since they finally have these best-selling kits back in stock...** They're going to load you up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) when you get yours today. Just look at all you get with this special:**It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit.** It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window.So you spare a **_ton_** and they're just getting warmed up, because...[**You also get $478 worth of FREE Gifts!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today.That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on our website.So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND..._(Hold on to your hat, folks)_**FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years.**FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos.**FREE Bonus #4:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase.But that's not all because you also get...**FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE.**FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit.**FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food.But we're still not done because you also get...**FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF Your Next Purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal.But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get...**FREE Bonus #9:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you.**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._5qo7BB0vzXKpIA)** Isn't that great?The best part is...The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. [**So you're getting huge savings today.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan.** Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock.**Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises.[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._yojEIg)First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try.Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still **return triple your purchase amount.** That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years.**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** You need to get 'er done today.Why?Because if you don't [take action](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-mDvvRsEfVM0YRgK1w) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless.But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [imagine how much better you'll feel right away](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._kgw7sAOKGsqKB0elA). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat.Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit.**As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do.**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters| | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit in the mail and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmered. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our Food4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-2LJYSJL9YCXfetNHcLdKg)**
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDkyLWZmM2I3MzQyYTUxNzQyZTBiZjM4Mzc4MWZkYjg0YWYyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/OV6aWFTaKeY54f3DMTJh5w) to unsubscribe.
---

body:

| | | Peter, I signed a very limited number of copies of my new book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

As an elite Conservative Patriot, I know you need to have one - so I set one aside for you until midnight tonight._As I said, there are an extremely limited number of signed copies and this is your only chance to grab one._

**This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump 's successful four years as president.**

President Trump showed us how to win. He said he was going to cut taxes, he did. He said he was going to reduce regulations, he did. Do what you told them you were going to do. That's the model that works.

**[By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60014851:6KQ_x1oNt:m:1:3317145305:178192AED26C13A12B748266CFC1C28C:r "By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House
Majority. ")**

Pelosi's targeting conservatives across America and she has more money than she knows what to do with. Pelosi will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL, including dragging conservatives in ALL 50 states through the mud.

Taking back the House is the key to saving America. Without the House, our country will be lost forever to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

**[So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I've signed won't last long, so order yours immediately.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60014851:6KQ_x1oNt:m:1:3317145305:178192AED26C13A12B748266CFC1C28C:r "So please
don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed
copy of my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.")**

I stand with House Conservatives who fight for freedom in the swamp and do what they said they would do.

**[Do you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60014851:6KQ_x1oNt:m:1:3317145305:178192AED26C13A12B748266CFC1C28C:r "Do you?")**

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

body:
Nearly everyone on this list said they’re on Trump’s team, not with the Liberals. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9723%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=9%2fKwXeiOjrn6%2fBqqxdMdzA&sysid=1)
Nearly everyone on this list said they’re on Trump’s team, not with the Liberals.
Hi again,
I wasn’t planning on doing this but I’m really hoping you’ll respond if I try one last time...
**Nearly everyone on this list said they’re on Trump’s team, not with the Liberals.** Now I have the task of contacting the last remaining hold outs -- _including you._
[**I was able to extend your deadline to respond for just 10 more minutes. Can you take a moment to answer?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27137%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bbJkz1V0glr%2f7LCRHMpi7w&sysid=1)
_\-- Sarah_

_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27138%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e2DD%2bqP%2b2nhys0%2bDGrJTIw&sysid=1)
From: Sarah
Subject: quick question for you_
Hey there,
My name is Sarah. I’m reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump’s brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven’t you responded? Would you join Trump’s site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump →](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27139%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nW%2f1%2fUs4vt2yxN4pnFc%2bBQ&sysid=1)**
**[No. I Don’t Support Trump →](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27130%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9qQgGQkwLqAUUEHgy71cng&sysid=1)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27131%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fEz6EAXZbOy0IUDT8Rno3g&sysid=1)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah

name: Trump News HQ
subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpp8unr4cjirn54u8kil1ml2uu5bk15clh4ucef0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3iecor2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sdkcsp63d1imlqecsrgedhneo5nm4qe8p1nccq74t37m4pj2t70marr0pb0mho6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3appl6hg7eor664ob6o37m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zph58318gq6jh4v9jgdmigg4vkotncs9b40kbuoo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3iecor2c1h2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zae16fet81ueq9lifc2opsbmpdbphfoi1s72gsao_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3iecor2c1h2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrjapplpq5e471bp2hu764gq5822ukct3dhifsa8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3iecor2c1h2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. subject: Our most cherished document
body:
As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv28akkaod8bfni3foj1i3p7bgfe6ob18er3t10g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uji72dr4mlr35cb66dh62sdkmsr3fd70e9o7eplnmtjm8tjk69jjcpdgmeoeac37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchgcpr69d9m6up72phmc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1c3ge9pj3chge49fg)

---
Hello, As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical Left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world that promises freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance, **our Constitution.** That’s why I’m writing personally to you today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain [**free access to Heritage’s Guide to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles against those on the far left.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8tvtllq00ph3ru0e43e15bk5vkk4pq4d9f1sm1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3iecor4c3h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq8loilk524vfdaco6anchftpd9166lsem682d6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3iecor4c3h2bs)
---
In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find:
* **Useful, clause-by-clause analysis** of the entire Constitution and each amendment
* Input from more than **100 constitutional scholars and legal experts** including President Reagan's former Attorney General Ed Meese
* **A thorough review** of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today
* **A copy of the Constitution** and the documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives through the trojan horse of “COVID safety. They want government control of anything they can get their hands on. It is for this reason we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, on the freedoms safeguarded to us in the Constitution. Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it protects for us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms. To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by [**clicking this link today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znf46u33picg324ubhe9264n3gpo3hi0f1o2c4m8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3iecor4c3h2bs)? If so, please use this link to activate your access to the guide today: [**https://secured.heritage.org/constitution/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsl6m6ogn8emlmni01d0lms6pgklcmlomg5276k0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3iecor4c3h2bs) This resource has been hailed across the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day. With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the radical Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers. [**I hope you'll claim your copy today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbfnol5u0207mupfj17foaurfdc2iqbqrvv72p38_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3iecor4c3h2bs) Thank you, Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation

Jim Jordan

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Mike Lindell Just Text Me A Message That He Wants Me To Share With You
body:
Update From Mike Lindell: I have been fortunate to develop many great relationships through the Re-Awaken America Tour with great heroes such as Eric
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5880022.4865.1.f66bae4d90e9257e6dac2f9b85b26c55) |
---
## Update From Mike Lindell:
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5880022.4866.1.e62cb6abefac3315d87242eb9781810c) www.MyPillow.com
---
I have been fortunate to develop many great relationships through the **Re-Awaken America Tour** with great heroes such as **Eric Trump** , **General Michael Flynn** and **Mike Lindell**.
_Mike Lindell_ wanted me to specifically let you know how grateful he is for the support great Americans like you have shown him and [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5880022.4867.1.f0b2a41265edab1cb7793c8240f391a0) over the last year in this fight to #SaveAmerica.
Right now, the Patriot movement is under attack, and we must stand **UNITED**! We have to recognize this is a fight between good and evil.
We must use our **3 Ts** to fight back:
1\. **Time** \- Attend events with other like-minded Patriots such as the Re-Awaken Tour (Myrtle Beach in May and Virgina Beach in July. Get more info at www.timetofreeamerica.com )
2\. **Talent** \- Use the gifts and abilities that God has given you to contribute to saving of America. _America needs you_!
3\. **Treasure** \- We must stop funding Deep State companies and start funing America First companies. Every dollar we spend is a bullet in this war.
**If we will fight, we will win.**
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. His business, [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5880022.4868.1.2053687c201a533936623bd395852f81), has been cancelled by all the big box stores and now his bank because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision to not FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies such as [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5880022.4869.1.b69f8e02b6f586865a6ad63e4df25185).
I want to encourage you to visit [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5880022.4870.1.167dc6f7a8744f90c13e438e5b771d7d) and look at all of the great America First products available (much more than just great pillows).
We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First.
Use the Promo Code **JACKSON** at checkout to save up to 66% while shopping at [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5880022.4871.1.f8e619ad2ad00c5e1124daa0d0e8c2c4)
Kendra and I love all of our [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5880022.4872.1.9e0315c6479e10cc045ebc04e63a7330) products and we TOTALLY support Mike Lindell! I hope you will too...
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on TruthSocial, GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5880022.4873.1.576e243a5c9cd5d53cd87d9d975887b1), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5880022.4874.1.86764389e0939b9e9962047d6d25f209), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5880022.4875.1.3cac8b175379483757715da17c609a3b), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5880022.4876.1.b3bb3ea7ecc89341161a10f3abc46d6a), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5880022.4877.1.a1483a48761afe61e08e74da42155c59)).

name: Great America Update
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6852%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Ju56ba2P%2bMIo3hx%2bBwI0Rg&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60550%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=il6k%2ftOI62V8%2fkDPji46Xg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60550%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=il6k%2ftOI62V8%2fkDPji46Xg&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60551%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LhFZBjDiQHRRZSEwYnl%2bRg&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6852%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Ju56ba2P%2bMIo3hx%2bBwI0Rg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6852%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Ju56ba2P%2bMIo3hx%2bBwI0Rg&sysid=1)

name: House Conservatives Trust
subject: House Conservatives Trust Newsletter: April 2nd
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Conservatives Trust, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee, https://www
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| [](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=7a979e4c07e42a07679ab778e684a0c0188fa1d2b1968641fdb014cc1c2704ed5fffff18c098f4424f319853d5b18e2c19ff255601f1ff3b)
---
| | **House Conservatives Trust Bi-Weekly Newsletter**
---

Welcome to the House Conservatives Trust Bi-Weekly Newsletter. This newsletter is a chance for us at HCT to share an inside look at news and events shaping our fight to take back the House for Republicans in 2022.

Indiana Governor Holcomb flip-flopped, vetoing a bill banning transgender females from participating in girl's sports in the state. Conservative groups call House Republicans to override the veto and pass the legislation.

The media finally admitted Hunter Biden abandoned a laptop in a Delaware computer repair shop. The thousands of emails recovered from its hard drive were easily verifiable; too bad it is too late for the 2020 election.

Chairman Banks spoke to Breitbart about Florida's "Don't Say Gay" bill, transgender females in women's sports, and the left's desire to inject age-inappropriate gender ideology into elementary school classrooms.

Chairman Banks called for an investigation into the funding of U.S. green groups that advocate for reduced U.S. oil and gas production, citing possible heavy investment from Putin-aligned and Kremlin-aligned groups and potential national security risks.

Chairman Banks sent a private memo to every member of the Republican Study Committee laying out all 81 policies from the Biden Administration that have harmed American energy independence and caused gas prices to rise drastically.

---
* * *
---

**" In 2022, we're going to take back the House" \- President Donald J. Trump
**
---
| | | | [](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=7a979e4c07e42a076aaa68745e69738b59f2a1c219c6f57de809cbf59dced8523a2283f324ee89c77d8436bbf0910340975a5dad95b2c275)
---
|
**Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's failed agenda has led to rampant inflation, a border crisis, American families suffering and embarassment abroad. We must fight back TODAY. Will you join us?**
---
| | [PITCH IN TO FIGHT BACK](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=7a979e4c07e42a07170496103004b1ae6537ff8d1778d13c1628da0ceaa5b66d5f1df529c0399797cad73fa7a6f90a72afa7c97f350a46e8)
---
* * *
---
**SAVING GIRLS SPORTS**
---
This week Governor Holcomb changed his previous stance and vetoed House-passed legislation written to protect the integrity of girls' sports in the state.

Indiana's GOP Governor is facing calls from Republicans to override his veto of a bill banning transgender females from competing in girls' school sports.
---
| | | [READ MORE HERE](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=7a979e4c07e42a07fdd0b414c9b6f3c71373f591d405809f30c13f783bfab0d52ac3aa1030db191f721c3459cc10c9c382700aa21fcb229b)
---
* * *
---
**WHERE'S HUNTER BIDEN?**
---
This week the liberal media finally admitted the Hunter Biden laptop story was true. The laptop is Hunter's, and he authored the thousands of emails recovered from the hard drive that appears to show an influence-influence peddling operation involving Hunter and Jim Biden that Joe Biden was at least aware of.

The liberal media fact-checkers should be more interested in discovering: if and when President Biden knew about this operation, if he was involved and whether or not he benefited from the corruption.

---
| | [READ MORE HERE](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=7a979e4c07e42a0715778cd98135fdf5fd00501a05c1ddf216c09d7f766c5f0af63ff7614749a24d8f159dfd47bd4bfca2acf5b9e1914850)
---
* * *
---
**BANKS STANDS UP TO WOKE BULLIES**
---
Chairman Banks gave an exclusive interview to Breitbart on the radical left and woke bullies who want to inject their age-inappropriate gender ideology into classrooms and allow biological males to compete in girls' sports.

The interview praises Florida Gov. Desantis for standing up to gender ideology radicals and criticizes Indiana Gov. Holcomb for giving in to pressure to allow transgender females to compete in girls' sports.

---
| | [READ MORE HERE](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=7a979e4c07e42a07ff4afc693d6e61deb999a21537423bb31bc62c2d098bfe1808def849cc6fa68f08ad532dffcc1abdbc03d2264e63b024)
---
* * *
---
**CHAIRMAN BANKS CALL FOR U.S. GREEN GROUPS TO TESTIFY**
---
Last week, Chairman Banks sent a letter to Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen calling for her to lead an investigation into whether Russia is secretly funding radical climate change groups that advocate against U.S. domestic oil and gas production.

An excerpt of the _[letter](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=7a979e4c07e42a07d5fd0fd22b68a7216d2c459e2c8537b18f161f8df710d29f1d59fd8e8af4f760a6ac8a58c85fa76883bc9ce5d29e0e94 "letter")_ is here:

_" As the free world descends into yet another global conflict, it is imperative that the United States remain free from foreign manipulation.

The Russian government has sought to expand its political and cultural influence in Europe. They have gone to great lengths to increase Europe's reliance on Russian oil and gas.
In 2014, NATO Secretary-General Anders Fogh Rasmussen stated:

"I have met allies who can report that Russia, as part of their sophisticated information and disinformation operations, engaged actively with so-called non-governmental organizations, environmental organizations working against shale gas, to maintain European dependence on imported Russian gas."

Dependence on Russian gas has made it harder for European countries to counter Russia's invasion of Ukraine. But it's not just Europe. In 2021, the US purchased a record amount of Russian oil, and Russia had directed its influence effort at Americans."_
---
| | [READ MORE HERE](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=7a979e4c07e42a078dbefe4324774440232146924819fd3d4bd3222bfc65e313b884d9df9e0f5aa43d4f4b3066e36f9e5e9115a55c9dc4ad)
---
| | | [READ THE FULL RSC LETTER HERE](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=7a979e4c07e42a0736a918f0396705e84cb64bedc5424eeabfc2439212967f8e2cfdce5503d3743d7c180584593a2b6dd127d4b4a414348e)
---
* * *
---
** ****RSC MEMO: A Promise Kept: Biden 's War on American Energy **
---

This past week, Chairman Banks sent a _[private memo](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=7a979e4c07e42a07778fffce97396cb97009486b6fe6788b5c9dede1323f4a6a3906ebcca3eda5e9877414ab9a285b5c436aaf25270a277f "private memo ") _to all RSC members laying out all of President Biden's misguided policies that have caused fuel prices to skyrocket.

An excerpt of the memo is below:

_" But we decided to take a closer look. Biden promised a War on Energy. 15 months into his presidency, gas prices reached an all-time high. Is that because Joe Biden actually kept a promise?

I had my staff do a deep dive, and the results are startling. President Biden has waged an unprecedent, government-wide assault on our nation's ability to produce cheap, reliable energy."_

---
| | | [READ THE FULL MEMO HERE](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=7a979e4c07e42a0739bae057f57dc37bba40217a29f1b5a9577b3a75c1171f07aa75849e6cf7238b448c493ca6e0abe30f38d401fb45cd9d)
---
* * *
---
** ****HOW MUCH MORE ARE YOU PAYING FOR GAS THANKS TO LOW ENERGY JOE?**
---
| | | | [](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=7a979e4c07e42a0761c21044b5512ce6f6a99d97ee378ca494a56331edec262f4fffc50faf67c0ee6aa83dff78c1e35f2d246393e5d41da7)
---
|
**Click the link to calculate how much more you are spending on gas under Joe Biden than you were under President Trump. **

---

---
| |
* * *
---
| | | | _**31 House Democrats have retired
because they know a RED WAVE is coming in 2022! Stand with House Conservatives TODAY and FIRE NANCY PELOSI!**_
---
| | [STEP UP NOW](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=7a979e4c07e42a07bb4448e0bb0f5dc473ccae5b744a0744581ee59360a6e00f23b162b0808f0fe49a0d54f5e6e1c90efaea18f85e5f8807)
---
* * *

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | House Conservatives Trust Bi-Weekly Newsletter Welcome to the House Conservatives Trust Bi-Weekly Newsletter. This newsletter is a chance for us at HCT to share an inside look at news and events shaping our fight to take back the House for Republicans in 2022. Indiana Governor Holcomb flip-flopped, vetoing a bill banning transgender females from participating in girl's sports in the state. Conservative groups call House Republicans to override the veto and pass the legislation. The media finally admitted Hunter Biden abandoned a laptop in a Delaware computer repair shop. The thousands of emails recovered from its hard drive were easily verifiable; too bad it is too late for the 2020 election. Chairman Banks spoke to Breitbart about Florida's "Don't Say Gay" bill, transgender females in women's sports, and the left's desire to inject age-inappropriate gender ideology into elementary school classrooms. Chairman Banks called for an investigation into the funding of U.S. green groups that advocate for reduced U.S. oil and gas production, citing possible heavy investment from Putin-aligned and Kremlin-aligned groups and potential national security risks. Chairman Banks sent a private memo to every member of the Republican Study Committee laying out all 81 policies from the Biden Administration that have harmed American energy independence and caused gas prices to rise drastically. " In 2022, we're going to take back the House" \- President Donald J. Trump | | | | | Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's failed agenda has led to rampant inflation, a border crisis, American families suffering and embarassment abroad. We must fight back TODAY. Will you join us? | | SAVING GIRLS SPORTS This week Governor Holcomb changed his previous stance and vetoed House-passed legislation written to protect the integrity of girls' sports in the state. Indiana's GOP Governor is facing calls from Republicans to override his veto of a bill banning transgender females from competing in girls' school sports. | | | WHERE'S HUNTER BIDEN? This week the liberal media finally admitted the Hunter Biden laptop story was true. The laptop is Hunter's, and he authored the thousands of emails recovered from the hard drive that appears to show an influence-influence peddling operation involving Hunter and Jim Biden that Joe Biden was at least aware of. The liberal media fact-checkers should be more interested in discovering: if and when President Biden knew about this operation, if he was involved and whether or not he benefited from the corruption. | | BANKS STANDS UP TO WOKE BULLIES Chairman Banks gave an exclusive interview to Breitbart on the radical left and woke bullies who want to inject their age-inappropriate gender ideology into classrooms and allow biological males to compete in girls' sports. The interview praises Florida Gov. Desantis for standing up to gender ideology radicals and criticizes Indiana Gov. Holcomb for giving in to pressure to allow transgender females to compete in girls' sports. | | CHAIRMAN BANKS CALL FOR U.S. GREEN GROUPS TO TESTIFY Last week, Chairman Banks sent a letter to Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen calling for her to lead an investigation into whether Russia is secretly funding radical climate change groups that advocate against U.S. domestic oil and gas production. An excerpt of the "letter" is here: " As the free world descends into yet another global conflict, it is imperative that the United States remain free from foreign manipulation. The Russian government has sought to expand its political and cultural influence in Europe. They have gone to great lengths to increase Europe's reliance on Russian oil and gas. In 2014, NATO Secretary-General Anders Fogh Rasmussen stated: "I have met allies who can report that Russia, as part of their sophisticated information and disinformation operations, engaged actively with so-called non-governmental organizations, environmental organizations working against shale gas, to maintain European dependence on imported Russian gas." Dependence on Russian gas has made it harder for European countries to counter Russia's invasion of Ukraine. But it's not just Europe. In 2021, the US purchased a record amount of Russian oil, and Russia had directed its influence effort at Americans." | | | | | RSC MEMO: A Promise Kept: Biden 's War on American Energy This past week, Chairman Banks sent a "private memo " to all RSC members laying out all of President Biden's misguided policies that have caused fuel prices to skyrocket. An excerpt of the memo is below: " But we decided to take a closer look. Biden promised a War on Energy. 15 months into his presidency, gas prices reached an all-time high. Is that because Joe Biden actually kept a promise? I had my staff do a deep dive, and the results are startling. President Biden has waged an unprecedent, government-wide assault on our nation's ability to produce cheap, reliable energy." | | | **HOW MUCH MORE ARE YOU PAYING FOR GAS THANKS TO LOW ENERGY JOE? | | | | | Click the link to calculate how much more you are spending on gas under Joe Biden than you were under President Trump. | | | | | | | | 31 House Democrats have retired because they know a RED WAVE is coming in 2022! Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I am joined by Richard Morrison, with the Competitive Enterprise Institute. Hello – Senate control is on the line here in Iowa.
Republican Chuck Grassley officially filed to run for re-election, and if he wins an eighth term, Democrats may very well lose our Senate majority for the next 2 years.
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs have already raised millions of dollars to spend trying to defeat me, but I have something even stronger: Grassroots donors like you.
**My campaign has set a goal of getting 500 new donors today to help me defeat Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Senate majority – but right now, we’re still coming up short:**
[**Please, can I count on you to join my campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley by making a donation of any amount before midnight tonight? I’m not taking any corporate PAC money, so I need you in this fight if we’re going to turn Iowa blue and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43691685/338287462/-42398318?refcode=em20220402am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQ1NjlkMS04NGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o6NEZls0NCzZb2mfiQZL1xhw8sJT-QJQemuTtVCXPDc=)

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg58v4bkr63d1b3ik04ptj2dg00hliqlo9tbui1o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbo72dpksdp36slh6ppncsdm6pqbcor6ciqr9obj65pjctjgclrr4cr4eph74d5n6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjad77mpi6cdb2mmq3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5ge9o31c5jmaoh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2g10412k907trkjbq64np13nfnl6dog13m82670_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjg62ob7clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze4h1m36l9iu32abhlpgard0t547mumokm0kvrs8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjg62ob7clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z21oe7v2pd4ga0fd76fbvogmgg3r76r9dicqe30o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjg62ob7clh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Sam
subject: Shocked and disappointed...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey Peter,
My name is Sam. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**
[**If you _are_ receiving this important Republican communication, could you spare a moment to respond right away?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60015680:JkKPg1oIN:m:1:3317145305:9968336445CF31A0BFB16B8277D42D28:r)
Please choose one of the following options:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60015680:JkKPg1oIN:m:1:3317145305:9968336445CF31A0BFB16B8277D42D28:r) | **[YES: I STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60015680:JkKPg1oIN:m:1:3317145305:9968336445CF31A0BFB16B8277D42D28:r)** **[NO: I STAND WITH THE DEMOCRATS >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60015680:JkKPg1oIN:m:1:3317145305:9968336445CF31A0BFB16B8277D42D28:r)**
---|---
I know you're busy so I'll wrap this up, but I really hope you'll respond.
I'll be going over our final results in about 10 minutes. [**Can I be on the lookout for your answer?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60015680:JkKPg1oIN:m:1:3317145305:9968336445CF31A0BFB16B8277D42D28:r)
Thanks in advance for your quick response.
\-- Sam
_Republican Headquarters (Team Scalise)_
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003

After Donald Trump's disastrous presidency, President Biden had a steep uphill climb to get our country back on track – and he has delivered the steady leadership we've needed. **The latest polls show that a MAJORITY of Democrats approve of President Biden!**
But a president's approval rating is one of the _single best_ indicators of how their party performs in the midterm elections, which is why Mitch McConnell and the GOP are 100% focused on attacking Biden and destroying his agenda – all as part of their strategy to take back the Senate in November.
With the upcoming elections fast approaching, we need to update our data _immediately _to confirm where top Democrats like you stand. **But according to our records, your response is missing today. Please, tell us by 11:59 p.m. tonight:**

Team – Trump’s huge Michigan rally is TONIGHT! He’ll be taking the stage with Kristina Karamo and a whole host of ‘big lie’ extremists.
Their goal? Defeating Jocelyn Benson this November and ending democracy in this must-win state. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_040222_B1_AC_30D]
We won’t let them. Can Secretary Benson and the rest of the team count on you to rush $20 before Trump’s rally to help defeat Trump and the ‘big lie’? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_040222_B1_AC_30D]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_040222_B1_AC_30D]
It’s easy to see why Trump has his eyes fixed on Michigan.
Even before the 2020 election, Democratic Secretary and voting rights champion Jocelyn Benson infuriated him by fighting misinformation and ensuring access to the ballot.
And after she stood up to him again in November 2020, he’s 100% focused on defeating her and electing his hand-picked candidate, election denier Kristina Karamo, to the Secretary’s office. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_040222_B1_AC_30D]
Tonight’s rally will fire up the far-right base like nothing else – we’re bracing for a surge in donations from the MAGA network to defeat Benson and other voting rights champions.
We need your help to fight back. We set a 250 gift rapid response goal we need to hit by midnight tonight to show Trump we won’t be intimidated by his hate-filled rally. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_040222_B1_AC_30D]
Will you rush $20 or more before the rally begins to show the far-right that this grassroots team is fired up and ready to protect democracy in Michigan? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_040222_B1_AC_30D]

name: Gibbons for Ohio
subject: ICYMI: Politifact and CNN: Josh Mandel falsely claims Mike Gibbons said military service isn't real work
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lEJjCWKxy4rtXk4gJ9GWwAMvzBX98lMURGY-OCPGcHATH00Yzbbx9e21pDdY1mgGlazA5JJ7c9P85YXcDSw9skzbMwm88FxUYzXQSuBXXiTU54BDwSw5Z2_9M-bAb3djOERu0J3Czv4JbGfre3j0WQ==&c=TzW4lzp6AmrPlWUkIc8AUuadlLCFrLr5O3NZHqUeQsa9UT3B4qa5ig==&ch=HAs0-zTrDaEzsTpM_BNFtNvca_fsuFAeY5D4Xgy10SWVLvmqD6Cdxw==)
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: April 2, 2022
---
| Contact: Press Office press@gibbonsforohio.com
---
| ICYMI: Politifact and CNN: Josh Mandel falsely claims Mike Gibbons said military service isn't real work
---
| Cleveland, OH - Two new fact checks released from [Politifact](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lEJjCWKxy4rtXk4gJ9GWwAMvzBX98lMURGY-OCPGcHATH00Yzbbx9ej35-7kkyxMWPTLxXvtywaddl287zw9gHkQmqs1lXUw1OYj7pt27hWtSIwR7Utd58Ih8w1wfVVYV9wX8Aoab2iG1MbZZIe-r_3A8K9KmEwsA2hgZMYU479lAT7_A9u8Ld2Pnp4um2SqgrngC4ijvk4cboD3Yf3s0md6Qh3ES5x7VXnXF1pyigVdMDne80E4rBjvWebUBeVZB-HRhtV_IBNPugriEfltvw==&c=TzW4lzp6AmrPlWUkIc8AUuadlLCFrLr5O3NZHqUeQsa9UT3B4qa5ig==&ch=HAs0-zTrDaEzsTpM_BNFtNvca_fsuFAeY5D4Xgy10SWVLvmqD6Cdxw==) and [CNN](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lEJjCWKxy4rtXk4gJ9GWwAMvzBX98lMURGY-OCPGcHATH00Yzbbx9ej35-7kkyxMp534hkzUDaWkNyWErLLiZdbMRBoDxlQhsTkSQTRXSsKs6Oj5uBVt0KjilvFh1tjMqdbdupQ5tzpgn_OqSwGIvFryHFa2M3bxDynctWWCBbj6ERaPwFORHu8ldIpqxKn1_fZBH2RjRoLKj1e9uJa1FiO6tOKf0KZ-v8OwWP5NDRJyjqFIo1IhznzaYV7nfETn_FEgxHiP1KRUhHud9XfvEQ==&c=TzW4lzp6AmrPlWUkIc8AUuadlLCFrLr5O3NZHqUeQsa9UT3B4qa5ig==&ch=HAs0-zTrDaEzsTpM_BNFtNvca_fsuFAeY5D4Xgy10SWVLvmqD6Cdxw==) on Friday reiterated that Josh Mandel falsely claimed Mike Gibbons doesn't respect military veterans.
These reports prove that Mandel attempted to twist and smear Mike's words in order to save his own floundering campaign.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lEJjCWKxy4rtXk4gJ9GWwAMvzBX98lMURGY-OCPGcHATH00Yzbbx9ej35-7kkyxMWPTLxXvtywaddl287zw9gHkQmqs1lXUw1OYj7pt27hWtSIwR7Utd58Ih8w1wfVVYV9wX8Aoab2iG1MbZZIe-r_3A8K9KmEwsA2hgZMYU479lAT7_A9u8Ld2Pnp4um2SqgrngC4ijvk4cboD3Yf3s0md6Qh3ES5x7VXnXF1pyigVdMDne80E4rBjvWebUBeVZB-HRhtV_IBNPugriEfltvw==&c=TzW4lzp6AmrPlWUkIc8AUuadlLCFrLr5O3NZHqUeQsa9UT3B4qa5ig==&ch=HAs0-zTrDaEzsTpM_BNFtNvca_fsuFAeY5D4Xgy10SWVLvmqD6Cdxw==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lEJjCWKxy4rtXk4gJ9GWwAMvzBX98lMURGY-OCPGcHATH00Yzbbx9ej35-7kkyxMWPTLxXvtywaddl287zw9gHkQmqs1lXUw1OYj7pt27hWtSIwR7Utd58Ih8w1wfVVYV9wX8Aoab2iG1MbZZIe-r_3A8K9KmEwsA2hgZMYU479lAT7_A9u8Ld2Pnp4um2SqgrngC4ijvk4cboD3Yf3s0md6Qh3ES5x7VXnXF1pyigVdMDne80E4rBjvWebUBeVZB-HRhtV_IBNPugriEfltvw==&c=TzW4lzp6AmrPlWUkIc8AUuadlLCFrLr5O3NZHqUeQsa9UT3B4qa5ig==&ch=HAs0-zTrDaEzsTpM_BNFtNvca_fsuFAeY5D4Xgy10SWVLvmqD6Cdxw==)
---
| "Mandel claimed in an ad that Gibbons said "military service doesn't count as real work. Gibbons said in a debate that Mandel has never worked in the private sector; he didn't say what this ad claims. We rate Mandel's claim False."
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lEJjCWKxy4rtXk4gJ9GWwAMvzBX98lMURGY-OCPGcHATH00Yzbbx9ej35-7kkyxMp534hkzUDaWkNyWErLLiZdbMRBoDxlQhsTkSQTRXSsKs6Oj5uBVt0KjilvFh1tjMqdbdupQ5tzpgn_OqSwGIvFryHFa2M3bxDynctWWCBbj6ERaPwFORHu8ldIpqxKn1_fZBH2RjRoLKj1e9uJa1FiO6tOKf0KZ-v8OwWP5NDRJyjqFIo1IhznzaYV7nfETn_FEgxHiP1KRUhHud9XfvEQ==&c=TzW4lzp6AmrPlWUkIc8AUuadlLCFrLr5O3NZHqUeQsa9UT3B4qa5ig==&ch=HAs0-zTrDaEzsTpM_BNFtNvca_fsuFAeY5D4Xgy10SWVLvmqD6Cdxw==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lEJjCWKxy4rtXk4gJ9GWwAMvzBX98lMURGY-OCPGcHATH00Yzbbx9ej35-7kkyxMp534hkzUDaWkNyWErLLiZdbMRBoDxlQhsTkSQTRXSsKs6Oj5uBVt0KjilvFh1tjMqdbdupQ5tzpgn_OqSwGIvFryHFa2M3bxDynctWWCBbj6ERaPwFORHu8ldIpqxKn1_fZBH2RjRoLKj1e9uJa1FiO6tOKf0KZ-v8OwWP5NDRJyjqFIo1IhznzaYV7nfETn_FEgxHiP1KRUhHud9XfvEQ==&c=TzW4lzp6AmrPlWUkIc8AUuadlLCFrLr5O3NZHqUeQsa9UT3B4qa5ig==&ch=HAs0-zTrDaEzsTpM_BNFtNvca_fsuFAeY5D4Xgy10SWVLvmqD6Cdxw==)
---
| "Mandel inaccurately described Gibbons' comments when confronting him in the moment, then proceeded to turn his inaccurate description into a scripted attack ad."
These articles also highlight the latest ad from the Gibbons campaign addressing Mandel's lies, titled "Served."
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lEJjCWKxy4rtXk4gJ9GWwAMvzBX98lMURGY-OCPGcHATH00Yzbbx9WbNUEv0hYtIwQm19A5vXX2_tTW-GmoIpbdt7KrEsdl-Tx4aaSQLEqeSVwvNIe_VbSobDBe-Zadk5RjEpM3Bluv_IZhM50C0pQ==&c=TzW4lzp6AmrPlWUkIc8AUuadlLCFrLr5O3NZHqUeQsa9UT3B4qa5ig==&ch=HAs0-zTrDaEzsTpM_BNFtNvca_fsuFAeY5D4Xgy10SWVLvmqD6Cdxw==)
---
| This ad comes off the heels of the Gibbons campaign launching the new [Veterans for Mike Gibbons coalition](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lEJjCWKxy4rtXk4gJ9GWwAMvzBX98lMURGY-OCPGcHATH00Yzbbx9dRpXX_oZRYMFD5xBs8yK_KPFxlYRwjmLhSDjCg8CE9danyrMuuFte85H3usSO3VSj2GbudsmZ-Cinfd6i_BMBMfoifM5Vk7UxSr0bChqlsm2p7I422Em1A=&c=TzW4lzp6AmrPlWUkIc8AUuadlLCFrLr5O3NZHqUeQsa9UT3B4qa5ig==&ch=HAs0-zTrDaEzsTpM_BNFtNvca_fsuFAeY5D4Xgy10SWVLvmqD6Cdxw==), a group of over forty veterans that know Mike supports our veterans and will fight to give them the best possible in the U.S. Senate.
Like any other career politician, Mandel smears and lies to score dishonest political points. Mike Gibbons has nothing but respect for our men and women in uniform and their families, and this move by Mandel showcases that he's nothing but another career politician who will lie to get elected.
Mandel should remove these false ads from the airwaves.

---
| ###
---
|

---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lEJjCWKxy4rtXk4gJ9GWwAMvzBX98lMURGY-OCPGcHATH00Yzbbx9bk78Qar3Gu51lAK_ffds95A7Out9h4mZ1hqiqQlyVhaofc59QmAb1l3g5r1ZzDzTncHJWuoDbFAxmMSk6zCp4PoWHqv5IwK_Guk4Xy_3If0&c=TzW4lzp6AmrPlWUkIc8AUuadlLCFrLr5O3NZHqUeQsa9UT3B4qa5ig==&ch=HAs0-zTrDaEzsTpM_BNFtNvca_fsuFAeY5D4Xgy10SWVLvmqD6Cdxw==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lEJjCWKxy4rtXk4gJ9GWwAMvzBX98lMURGY-OCPGcHATH00Yzbbx9e21pDdY1mgG6ecNdv83Ph0C2GA8EQpuq3cDCirLDWqT7tNCEN0Gfzg3CdJp3eYMJyeh2lasz5VHaV77IRzHrd8B2miW45TDr1NwGOBaAklB&c=TzW4lzp6AmrPlWUkIc8AUuadlLCFrLr5O3NZHqUeQsa9UT3B4qa5ig==&ch=HAs0-zTrDaEzsTpM_BNFtNvca_fsuFAeY5D4Xgy10SWVLvmqD6Cdxw==)

clean_body: | | | | | | == | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: April 2, 2022 | Contact: Press Office press@gibbonsforohio.com | ICYMI: Politifact and CNN: Josh Mandel falsely claims Mike Gibbons said military service isn't real work | Cleveland, OH - Two new fact checks released from == and == on Friday reiterated that Josh Mandel falsely claimed Mike Gibbons doesn't respect military veterans. These reports prove that Mandel attempted to twist and smear Mike's words in order to save his own floundering campaign. | == | == | "Mandel claimed in an ad that Gibbons said "military service doesn't count as real work. Gibbons said in a debate that Mandel has never worked in the private sector; he didn't say what this ad claims. We rate Mandel's claim False." | == | == | "Mandel inaccurately described Gibbons' comments when confronting him in the moment, then proceeded to turn his inaccurate description into a scripted attack ad." These articles also highlight the latest ad from the Gibbons campaign addressing Mandel's lies, titled "Served." | == | This ad comes off the heels of the Gibbons campaign launching the new ==, a group of over forty veterans that know Mike supports our veterans and will fight to give them the best possible in the U.S. Senate. Like any other career politician, Mandel smears and lies to score dishonest political points. Mike Gibbons has nothing but respect for our men and women in uniform and their families, and this move by Mandel showcases that he's nothing but another career politician who will lie to get elected. Mandel should remove these false ads from the airwaves. | ### | | == == | | www.GibbonsforOhio.com | | Gibbons for Ohio | 14500 Lorain Ave # 110644 , Cleveland, OH 44111 | | Sent by mailto:press@gibbonsforohio.com powered by

I am running for Congress to return common sense to Washington and give help to those who need it most. Joe Biden has failed us, and Chrissy Houlahan has been by his side every step of the way.

subject: They tried to cancel me. I never stopped fighting.
