| | Patriots -

It's now been over 365 days since the leak to the failing New York Times - a clear operation meant to destroy my name and prevent me from representing my district.

_**The Deep State and the Fake News media coordinated to take me out, but they didn’t know they were dealing with a Florida Man!**_

I went on [**_Tucker Carlson_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt9b8e5glf871ukavudggbpjul6b7ppvqg9gn9tg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjg69o70cjh2bs) to mark the anniversary of this disgusting smear against me - and highlighted my continued fight to hold the Swamp accountable.

[**_Watch the exclusive interview here._**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhtp9r3fr8eq2ph56j3gt3cjjaus0dcn0233s01o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjg69o70cjh2bs)

_**But remember, they aren’t really coming for me. They are coming for you. I’m just in the way.**_

The Left will keep trying to cancel me, but this Florida Man won’t quit. But I need you in my corner to continue this fight, Whitney. Stand with me today and chip in a small donation - **send a message to the Left that we aren’t done fighting.**

name: ICYMI News
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr7g5sarhunkltq77gb6mmtvq7h3bamockcq6ar8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbor4s3mc1ojeor0cjhm8pb36qpm8t5iehpr6o9icjgraohimjgn1p3166qjfcpn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti61j75dpjcjjreob665ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5ge9o34s3i6eoh5u)
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3852fs0huaf4oueu1j47uquho6vhn5palcu2aio_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjg69o74cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zreetp7tip916oq30tptuf03o4hegok962oqvvjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjg69o74cth2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline fo**r you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv0qsjo0dmnjh8g59kb7urleapac8o28hc669d4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjg69o74cth2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z303smom60ah6i8rkt23c53fpovd1qbh97atice0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjg69o74cth2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2p4075qmgvolvro5ntco7smej6avjiplmpkug90_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjg69o74cth2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlv0vasarp5vv9uism14r296mefqcvcbpkfrunf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjg69o74cth2bs) today.**
When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3pc874mcc0a4cps8ipp4c79c5ocl94e64u0nt0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjg69o74cth2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zeovntv25qa23ml2jss4kk9373rdp821364biimo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” This free course is called “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the “fake news” New York Times. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. The response has been astounding. We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards, Bill Gray Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty. | | Derek, Conventional wisdom suggests that Dems are cruisin’ for a bruisin’ this fall, and a loss in the Ohio Senate race will all but guarantee that. The only person standing between Mitch McConnell and a Senate majority is you, Derek. If we’re going to have a chance in hell of defending the Senate, then we need you to step up right now. **[Can you PLEASE split a contribution of $25 or more between Tim Ryan's campaign and CommonGood today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43708751/338336712/-367109815?refcode=20220402_CGVA_Ryan_JC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGY1MDZiNy05NWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DVFMRMiIbXyVMqhML0UVEbZZaMy3M45Pp6ez51DJ2Ss=)** Fundraising deadlines are a matter of life or death for campaigns—whether or not Tim has the resources could be the difference between meaningful progress or a negligent, hostile Senate under Mitch McConnell. subject: Here's Something Good

body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/6ca78505644892fe/f0f4551aca617858c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Friend, It’s been another B.I.G. week for our campaign to take back the U.S. Senate! We kicked off our Statewide Tour and closed out our final fundraising quarter before the May primary. To everyone who’s contributed thus far, THANK YOU! It’s humbling to have your investment in this effort, and we truly couldn’t do this without your support.
---
---
# _**Statewide Tour Kickoff**_
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/6ca78505644892fe/1d25a473c5c3aa11c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Thank you to everyone who joined us Tuesday for our Statewide Tour kickoff in Jefferson! It was great to see so many friends and supporters. We’re hitting the road to share our message all across Georgia, and I hope to see you at a stop in your area soon!
---
---
# **_Georgia Public Safety_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/6ca78505644892fe/c9c9b5d9056321bbc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
A real honor to be in Forsyth this week to tour the Georgia Public Safety Training Center! I appreciate the warm welcome, and I’m grateful for our law enforcement officers who keep our communities and families safe. It’s humbling to have the support of 76 sheriffs across Georgia, and I will always Back the Blue in the U.S. Senate.
---
---
# _**Join Us In Emanuel County**_
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/6ca78505644892fe/871a6600d246b035c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We’re coming to Swainsboro! Hope you’ll join us for a meet & greet on our Statewide Tour to learn more about why I’m the ONLY Republican who can defeat Raphael Warnock in November. Thank you to Team ’22 and our volunteers who are planning events like these across Georgia. [**Tickets are going fast. Claim yours today!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/6ca78505644892fe/4f4954af764945d2c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/6ca78505644892fe/2cfb6fe0b65321f5c3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/6ca78505644892fe/defbc7bafb793f36c3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/6ca78505644892fe/03a12f014f24bd8fc3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! Our last End of Quarter deadline before the primary may have passed, but our need for resources is still great. [**If you haven't contributed yet, I'd be honored to have your support. Every dollar will be put to work to share our message and flip this Senate seat red.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/6ca78505644892fe/c6de4bb628cd9cbbc3d6b838967d376c/37793) Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/6ca78505644892fe/c6d28136bfdca161c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/6ca78505644892fe/bef60ac35b807eb7c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/6ca78505644892fe/1bfd1718693a3042c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/6ca78505644892fe/5320a2c0fab71f15c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=6ca78505644892fe&d=c37a8693663111d7c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=6ca78505644892fe).

Andy Parker

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Did you see my interview on Tucker Carlson?
body:
They aren’t really coming for me. They are coming for you.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001coYkJ9kXEYCB4mnla8EX5tFwOb4jGaJJXkRLbMX-e1ozyWYcky4PO5xz6fNgN093aVQkBWFTT_L2sAjqR1QZ3No5B01Vp2bEGyatk3PzJmzK4ww9YizwyL0YGL95ybAljMOAc-3ENhn_tQROfYSRSdm5oaCOfQrTXQx4xgDqJwo84gUeQKhu8g==&c=yHpGTxgaioIrYacKmnUrCQNz0R_8WZhpeQ8mz4L7Iy9JsJ1vG7mwOA==&ch=Z4TyXa7x3ag3QYqQEFNedYJPOSulCKvb5iQvF2gu4KdcPoDcVVW9Jg==)
---
| Peter \-
---
| Yesterday marked 365 days since the leak to the failing New York Times - a clear operation meant to destroy my name and prevent me from representing my district.
The Deep State and the Fake News media coordinated to take me out, but they didn't know they were dealing with a Florida Man!
I went on Tucker Carlson to mark the anniversary of this disgusting smear against me - and highlighted my continued fight to hold the Swamp accountable.
[Watch the exclusive interview here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001coYkJ9kXEYCB4mnla8EX5tFwOb4jGaJJXkRLbMX-e1ozyWYcky4PO5xz6fNgN093aVQkBWFTT_L2sAjqR1QZ3No5B01Vp2bEGyatk3PzJmzK4ww9YizwyL0YGL95ybAljMOAc-3ENhn_tQROfYSRSdm5oaCOfQrTXQx4xgDqJwo84gUeQKhu8g==&c=yHpGTxgaioIrYacKmnUrCQNz0R_8WZhpeQ8mz4L7Iy9JsJ1vG7mwOA==&ch=Z4TyXa7x3ag3QYqQEFNedYJPOSulCKvb5iQvF2gu4KdcPoDcVVW9Jg==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001coYkJ9kXEYCB4mnla8EX5tFwOb4jGaJJXkRLbMX-e1ozyWYcky4PO5xz6fNgN093aVQkBWFTT_L2sAjqR1QZ3No5B01Vp2bEGyatk3PzJmzK4ww9YizwyL0YGL95ybAljMOAc-3ENhn_tQROfYSRSdm5oaCOfQrTXQx4xgDqJwo84gUeQKhu8g==&c=yHpGTxgaioIrYacKmnUrCQNz0R_8WZhpeQ8mz4L7Iy9JsJ1vG7mwOA==&ch=Z4TyXa7x3ag3QYqQEFNedYJPOSulCKvb5iQvF2gu4KdcPoDcVVW9Jg==)
---
| It's frightening that the U.S. Justice Department can act as a "secret police" and use coordinated leaks to take out their political opponents. But I am a fighter, and I will always stand up for our rights and our freedoms being taken away by the Deep State.
But remember, they aren't really coming for me. They are coming for you. I'm just in the way.
---
| | | [SUPPORT MY FIGHT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001coYkJ9kXEYCB4mnla8EX5tFwOb4jGaJJXkRLbMX-e1ozyWYcky4PO5xz6fNgN093aVQkBWFTT_L2sAjqR1QZ3No5B01Vp2bEGyatk3PzJmzK4ww9YizwyL0YGL95ybAljMOAc-3ENhn_tQROfYSRSdm5oaCOfQrTXQx4xgDqJwo84gUeQKhu8g==&c=yHpGTxgaioIrYacKmnUrCQNz0R_8WZhpeQ8mz4L7Iy9JsJ1vG7mwOA==&ch=Z4TyXa7x3ag3QYqQEFNedYJPOSulCKvb5iQvF2gu4KdcPoDcVVW9Jg==)
---
| Not only am I standing in the way, but I am also actively fighting to expose the Swamp. Earlier in the week, [I entered Hunter Biden's Laptop from Hell into the official Congressional record](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001coYkJ9kXEYCB4mnla8EX5tFwOb4jGaJJXkRLbMX-e1ozyWYcky4PO5xz6fNgN093aVQkBWFTT_L2sAjqR1QZ3No5B01Vp2bEGyatk3PzJmzK4ww9YizwyL0YGL95ybAljMOAc-3ENhn_tQROfYSRSdm5oaCOfQrTXQx4xgDqJwo84gUeQKhu8g==&c=yHpGTxgaioIrYacKmnUrCQNz0R_8WZhpeQ8mz4L7Iy9JsJ1vG7mwOA==&ch=Z4TyXa7x3ag3QYqQEFNedYJPOSulCKvb5iQvF2gu4KdcPoDcVVW9Jg==) so that all of Congress can see for themselves whether Hunter and the first family are compromised.
The Left will keep trying to cancel me, but this Florida Man won't quit. But I need you in my corner to continue this fight, Peter. Stand with me today and chip in a small donation - send a message to the Left that we aren't done fighting.
---
| | | [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001coYkJ9kXEYCB4mnla8EX5tFwOb4jGaJJXkRLbMX-e1ozyWYcky4PO5xz6fNgN093aVQkBWFTT_L2sAjqR1QZ3No5B01Vp2bEGyatk3PzJmzK4ww9YizwyL0YGL95ybAljMOAc-3ENhn_tQROfYSRSdm5oaCOfQrTXQx4xgDqJwo84gUeQKhu8g==&c=yHpGTxgaioIrYacKmnUrCQNz0R_8WZhpeQ8mz4L7Iy9JsJ1vG7mwOA==&ch=Z4TyXa7x3ag3QYqQEFNedYJPOSulCKvb5iQvF2gu4KdcPoDcVVW9Jg==)

|
Thanks for keeping up the fight,

clean_body: They aren’t really coming for me. They are coming for you. | | | | | | == | Peter \- | Yesterday marked 365 days since the leak to the failing New York Times - a clear operation meant to destroy my name and prevent me from representing my district. The Deep State and the Fake News media coordinated to take me out, but they didn't know they were dealing with a Florida Man! I went on Tucker Carlson to mark the anniversary of this disgusting smear against me - and highlighted my continued fight to hold the Swamp accountable. == | == | It's frightening that the U.S. Justice Department can act as a "secret police" and use coordinated leaks to take out their political opponents. But I am a fighter, and I will always stand up for our rights and our freedoms being taken away by the Deep State. But remember, they aren't really coming for me. They are coming for you. I'm just in the way. | | | == | Not only am I standing in the way, but I am also actively fighting to expose the Swamp. Earlier in the week, == so that all of Congress can see for themselves whether Hunter and the first family are compromised. The Left will keep trying to cancel me, but this Florida Man won't quit. But I need you in my corner to continue this fight, Peter. Stand with me today and chip in a small donation - send a message to the Left that we aren't done fighting. | | | == | Thanks for keeping up the fight, | == | Matt Gaetz | | | | | == == | | | == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Mckayla
subject: Thank You! We did it!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, **Firstly, I just want to say thank you to each and every one of you. Your support in this race means the world and it energizes me so much to know you’ve got my back.** In the last few months, we did some incredible work together. We created and fully funded the Fight Back Fund for any attacks coming our way. We fueled our grassroots movement with so many new folks joining our movement! And we spoke to thousands of voters. Late on Thursday night, we finished by hitting our End-of-Quarter Fundraising Goal! **We’re in such a strong position heading into the final weeks of this campaign.** We still need to keep a close eye on our fundraising as the dollars we raise in these final weeks could be the difference between winning or losing. But I’m more optimistic today than I have been at any point in this campaign, thanks to the work of this team in the past few months. I know we’re going to win and shock the establishment in July. Thank you for being in this fight with me. Mckayla | [ DONATE

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Always grateful for you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
I want to take a moment to say thank you for supporting my campaign.

Peter --

Because of this grassroots team, I am proud to report that we surpassed our March end-of-quarter goal! I want to take a moment to say **thank you** for supporting my campaign.

From environmental justice and workforce development, to ensuring that every student has access to higher education opportunities, I am fighting hard for our community -- and because we have reached our goal, we are starting off April right where we need to be.

**With you by my side, I know that our for-the-people agenda will be successful, and we will defend the Democratic House majority this year.**

We have important work ahead of us to move our democracy forward, but as we inch closer to the finish line, this grassroots team continues to make me proud every step of the way.

**Thank you.**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

name: Fairness Project
subject: some tough news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
As we prepare for Q2, we’re bracing ourselves for some tough decisions ahead. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43710114/338341652/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTUzNDE0Mi05ZGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ytq00rmx8Zx9p2OS5I-rkWkVPR_DYjAiFH7zDukDQIA=&emci=e0ebbdb0-7cb0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ca534142-9db2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) | Team — We have some tough news. **Despite all of our combined efforts, unfortunately, we did not hit our March End-of-Quarter goal. ** **First, we wanted to _thank every single person_ who donated to try and help us reach our goal.** Even though we didn’t hit our number, your donations will still be crucial to our ballot measure campaigns this year. Every donation — big or small — will go towards initiatives to expand health care, protect workers’ rights, and protect access to reproductive care. _**We’ll be honest,**_ fundraising has been pretty tough across the board. And believe us, _we get it_ — the current state of our economy, the country, and the world doesn’t put anyone in a particularly “charitable” mood. **But, team,_we were so close_** — $1,185 short to be exact. So, as we prepare for Q2, we’re bracing ourselves for some tough decisions ahead. _We can either cut our budget or raise the last $1,185 we need in the next few days._ [_**Team, will you join us with one final donation to our EOQ goal today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43710115/338341653/-2064049330?refcode=E14890-20220402-EOQTY-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTUzNDE0Mi05ZGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ytq00rmx8Zx9p2OS5I-rkWkVPR_DYjAiFH7zDukDQIA=) Cutting our budget means less resources to send volunteers out into the field, less polling to gauge how familiar voters are with our campaigns, and less funds to take extermist officials to court should they try and attack our voting rights or acces. With 23 out of 24 successful campaigns under our belt, and plenty more to come in 2022, we want to ensure we have the resources to continue doing our work _to the fullest_ — that means putting _every possible dollar_ behind running and winning ballot measure campaigns that bring progress to working people across the country. [_**If you’re with us in the fight for progress, can you help us build our resources and hit our March EOQ goal before it’s too late, team?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43710116/338341654/-2064049330?refcode=E14890-20220402-EOQTY-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTUzNDE0Mi05ZGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ytq00rmx8Zx9p2OS5I-rkWkVPR_DYjAiFH7zDukDQIA=) [SUPPORT OUR WORK →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43710117/338341655/-2064049330?refcode=E14890-20220402-EOQTY-SB-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTUzNDE0Mi05ZGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ytq00rmx8Zx9p2OS5I-rkWkVPR_DYjAiFH7zDukDQIA=) Thanks for your continued generosity, team! We couldn’t do this work without you. — Fairness Project

clean_body: As we prepare for Q2, we’re bracing ourselves for some tough decisions ahead. | | Team — We have some tough news. Despite all of our combined efforts, unfortunately, we did not hit our March End-of-Quarter goal. First, we wanted to thank every single person who donated to try and help us reach our goal. Even though we didn’t hit our number, your donations will still be crucial to our ballot measure campaigns this year. Every donation — big or small — will go towards initiatives to expand health care, protect workers’ rights, and protect access to reproductive care. We’ll be honest, fundraising has been pretty tough across the board. And believe us, we get it — the current state of our economy, the country, and the world doesn’t put anyone in a particularly “charitable” mood. But, team,we were so close — $1,185 short to be exact. So, as we prepare for Q2, we’re bracing ourselves for some tough decisions ahead. We can either cut our budget or raise the last $1,185 we need in the next few days. = Cutting our budget means less resources to send volunteers out into the field, less polling to gauge how familiar voters are with our campaigns, and less funds to take extermist officials to court should they try and attack our voting rights or acces. With 23 out of 24 successful campaigns under our belt, and plenty more to come in 2022, we want to ensure we have the resources to continue doing our work to the fullest — that means putting every possible dollar behind running and winning ballot measure campaigns that bring progress to working people across the country. = = Thanks for your continued generosity, team! We couldn’t do this work without you. — Fairness Project = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 23 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
You'd be doing me a huge favor by responding
| | |
---
Friend,

We've come so far since President Biden took office just over a year ago. From getting the COVID-19 pandemic under control to passing a once-in-a-generation infrastructure bill, Democrats are enacting legislation that's making a meaningful difference in the lives of Americans.
**There's so much more on our Democratic agenda – and as I build my campaign for U.S. Senate, I want to know which issues matter most to you.**
We have a lot of work to do before Election Day – and I'm relying on this grassroots team to help me shape my strategy to expand our Democratic Senate majority.
If you can spare just 60 seconds right now, will you take this Supporter Survey that my team _personalized_ just for you, friend? I'm still looking for 32 responses from your area before my team and I go through responses tomorrow morning, so you'd be doing me a huge favor by responding before this link expires at midnight.

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: So incredibly humbled by this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_april?amount=&refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_april?amount=&refcode2=logo]
Thank you to everyone who chipped into help meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. We got there late Thursday night, and I am incredibly grateful to every member of our grassroots team that made it happen.
You know, I didn’t grow up with money -- my family fought their way to the middle class. That means I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to give what you can so our team can communicate with voters when it matters most.
From my start as a community organizer to serving as a delegate in the Maryland House the past 5 years, I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for social justice. And as a husband and father, it’s important to me that we tackle our nation's defining challenges so we don't pass them on to the next generation.
If we keep working together, I can be the fresh voice we need in Congress to deliver results, not rhetoric, for our families.
Change can’t wait,
Jazz
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_april?amount=&refcode2=biobox_photo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_april?amount=&refcode2=biobox_photo]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus.
Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_april?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]

Largo, MD 20792

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: What should we think about income tax? Update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/incometax?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Hi Friend,

Good news! Mississippi is going to get a tax break.

Under proposals agreed by the state legislature last week, everyone will be exempt from paying state income tax on their first $18,000 earnings ($36,000 if they are a married couple).

**With the price of everything from gas to groceries skyrocketing, it is great to see the state’s leaders taking practical steps to help folks cope with the cost of living. **

Letting Mississippians keep more of their own money means that they will have more to spend on themselves, their families and in their own communities.

But as I discussed on SuperTalk with Gerard Gibert, the state income tax ought to be eliminated altogether.
---
| Right now Mississippi’s state government is sitting on a mountain of money. Besides the $1.2 billion surplus, Mississippi’s state leadership has about another $1.8 billion of federal ARPA (American Rescue Plan Act) money to allocate. Add that up, and our state government is sitting on something like $3 billion.

Yet only a fraction of that enormous amount is now going to be given back to taxpayers in the form of tax breaks. Most of that money mountain is going to be spent on government – perhaps inevitably expanding the size of government in the process. **Conservatives should not be wildly excited about that. **

Ronald Reagan, the greatest conservative leader of my lifetime, observed how ‘government does not tax to get the money it needs.” Instead “government always finds a need for the money it gets”. Indeed.

**As Mississippi’s conservative think tank, we believe even bolder steps are needed.** Over the past generation, a wave of growth and prosperity has swept the south; except for Mississippi, which has remained one of the poorest states in America.

Why has Mississippi not prospered like other southern states? Because welfare dependency on Washington does not work**. If getting handouts from the federal government made states wealthy, our state would be one of the richest in the Union. **

Rather than looking to Congressional appropriations committees to give out wealth to our state, we need far-reaching reforms to make our state the kind of place where wealth is created. That means making ourselves properly competitive. Many young Mississippians are forced to move to Texas, Florida or Tennessee to find work. It is no coincidence that neither of those three states have any state income tax at all.

Have a great weekend!

---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=67c65f847f&e=5703353baa)
---
What to do about Big Tech?
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a81d6392c4&e=5703353baa)
---
Progressive America is losing out to conservative states – Telegraph
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=bd50c3fae8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=bd50c3fae8).

subject: Tom Kean = Green Mandates + Higher Prices
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PHIL RIZZO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Kean supports green mandates that hike the cost of living | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jerseyrizzo/green-tom-kean?e=f7e301a8ae)
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriots,
[realtomkean.com](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=17bb79e356&e=f7e301a8ae)
We’re paying more for _everything_ in New Jersey.

And when it comes to the INSANELY high costs of cars and new housing, we have [Tom Kean](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=ce52186281&e=f7e301a8ae) to thank. _We’re_ paying the bill for _his_ liberal agenda.

Tom Kean decided a long time ago that his rich friends were more important than the hard-working New Jersey taxpayers who elected him.
---
| [SEND PHIL RIZZO TO FIGHT FOR YOU](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=e7de3d6f1a&e=f7e301a8ae "SEND PHIL RIZZO TO FIGHT FOR YOU")
---
| In vote after vote after vote (at least [_15 times_](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=5aa817e8ff&e=f7e301a8ae) by my count), Tom Kean voted to mandate California-style “Green” policies at the taxpayer’s expense. Here’s just a few examples...
* Kean voted YES to increase development and housing costs for all New Jerseyans by mandating electric vehicle charging stations and green “Renewable” energy bills.
* Kean voted YES to burdensome residential development project regulations which disincentivized new housing in New Jersey, sending already high rental prices through the roof.
* Kean voted YES to spend taxpayer money on expensive plug-in charging stations in New Jersey Turnpike rest areas.
* Kean voted YES to raise public debt for “environmental infrastructure.”
* Kean voted YES to spend taxpayer dollars on expensive, frivolous, and ineffective offshore wind farms along with tax handouts for their developers.
* Kean voted YES to require taxpayers to subsidize “green technology” for New Jersey boat manufacturers.

There’s more. Trust me. If you want to read the whole shocking record - [go here](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=10d08839a7&e=f7e301a8ae).
---
| [MEET THE REAL TOM KEAN](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=63fbe4eaf0&e=f7e301a8ae "MEET THE REAL TOM KEAN")
---
| Here’s the bottom line. Tom Kean has systematically _voted YES_ on so many radical leftist payouts that even Democrats are blushing. He raised taxes, put NJ into debt, jacked up housing and development costs, and destroyed entire sectors of the economy each time the radical Left asked him to. He is bad for our state, bad for America, and he has to go.
---
| [STOP THE SELL OUT - VOLUNTEER FOR PHIL](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=412fb71739&e=f7e301a8ae "STOP THE SELL OUT - VOLUNTEER FOR PHIL")
---
| If you send me to DC, I’ll report to _you_ and fight for _you_. I answer to the People of New Jersey _alone_. And if you know me at all by now, you know that I never back down from a fight.
---
| [GIVE AND SEND PHIL TO DRAIN THE SWAMP](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=bb70175695&e=f7e301a8ae "GIVE AND SEND PHIL TO DRAIN THE SWAMP")
---
| We’re going to send a message to the establishment that they can’t ignore, and we’ll take back our Congress too.

Join the fight for our state,
---
|
---
| Phil Rizzo

name: Doug Gansler
subject: The fight for disability justice hits close to home
body:
I got into politics because government was not doing enough to protect our most vulnerable. As Attorney General, I fought to protect adults with disabilities who were criminally neglected and as governor, I promise to look at every issue through the | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0pkdPTeWDxbBnoXXXLxMgPDQpWJvYZbzmsIAkCQZQ6ZnMKkYCXce7hWG42E1-qeSaSb0ndgcfgNar0cLe8yAbwQNdVtw1Xr1fN9eXCgBfEfrRGYtV3zbxBYvUks1ZsARqiFhBEvyU0ABRSrDZlF_FbZjV-Zuf_FbOTC9n1okNm5JF09BmL_2yf4TiwyyIhSuyX_dmhaABrbrGTXEc2L80gFXv93jRTDVYktErqIWszBSyLisKAWBGIUJ6FLKDW5m7El5mkQ7sgZJl_w_yi28oaA/3kv/qfaGLG87TYmJjKRk1cLcwg/h0/nepzztrMc_LdTjCfmgO-FiSJudUhgByXoO0ahbZTpK4)
---
Friends, I got into politics because government was not doing enough to protect our most vulnerable. As Attorney General, I fought to protect adults with disabilities who were criminally neglected and as governor, I promise to look at every issue through the lens of disability justice. Today, on World Autism Acceptance Day, [Candace and I are proud to announce our disability justice plan: Accessible Maryland,](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0pkdPTeWDxbBnoXXXLxMgPDQpWJvYZbzmsIAkCQZQ6ZnMKkYCXce7hWG42E1-qeSaTsCj2ggqssasBJV4094yj0erQaa8vhfpZf53T9yATXDrnX2M155xC_QI_BKVkW79BfSBIc6QW64zjAlGiPzwvaz6BI3-MxZUVMAgEIh2ce5CReFMOQUd_9JJPyFAqmjsa-QYGjdGj0h2uxn6_BT8qYUGywQkvLvDahUUwwuiFMjrXd-u9OxrZY9Gv2oRSTyAzucNcKQM8GIcTppQCNE-Jw/3kv/qfaGLG87TYmJjKRk1cLcwg/h1/EjhXd056sxpT8MInv6lXWK18q_XGQUkXk80rE_NhvCo) as we commit to making our state a more equitable and accessible place for all Marylanders. Our plan outlines just some of the ways our administration will incorporate better access and responsiveness for people with disabilities in Maryland.
---
[ **READ OUR PLAN HERE ->**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0pkdPTeWDxbBnoXXXLxMgPDQpWJvYZbzmsIAkCQZQ6ZnMKkYCXce7hWG42E1-qeSaYiQ4MpNhzCUMKtR399f0DpvBS1XXGqsFM90ymn7F-Wbz5cxz0Ts6Rkp1tKVWkqgp_geZXqRyhbn-LOF26c02NR7NvFBdTaK8PP-nNYbC28hzRQDECtb0ZWbVUlwR2LJhif3A3Mwnijesb_N-ddkXNVejx0ifFJI3dL3E3QkTrdDk3c3WA8ABoxhWfpewVl8iqmo21xiuj1MdORfTWqr53I/3kv/qfaGLG87TYmJjKRk1cLcwg/h2/5BlacvlYbFwVp5SLEvsP7tW6JUUXpgqF7yzSbV_bUmE)
---
We should celebrate our differences and provide those with different abilities adequate support to thrive -- instead, people with different abilities are all too often underserved and underestimated. I know this from family experience. My nephew, Vance, lives with cerebral palsy and autism. When he was a baby, the doctors told his parents he would never walk, talk, read or write. But with his hard work and sustained interventions, he can now do all those things and more! I am so proud of my nephew. He has accomplished so much against great odds. He has worked as a ticket-taker for a minor league team for four years, and even got to work the World Series for the Atlanta Braves this year -- turning his passion for baseball into a fulfilling job. **[Check out my recent conversation with Vance here!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/oZT1C-8NKsWHlAiWATd-7AqYp29k-xVfwolSv5yAidDg4dwU-nw1aJl3dTUVl-1K7EjTOOBOZRBGUAYHj4j9GRcD8rY6PoNRhaUuDIR0xTcLtOAeAQNsMt8UcHkDOo0VXul6daGetDXmiHtuag_HEskT5_-2YP3-K6y4AfPs9YUHEkHJwiSBgF6REswNYVrzCBRf39tpKAmI1H5wGNEaSQ-n2L9GElsEsvem4KAMHXfV1f2uXj1UHEyzY_sWrcvO-7PHjDdLYw3aQAjhYqSvtDA1oKRDtPUzdntvNPlEfWdGdbUC5woAwNo8Ee_HBFi9qK-Z0Tssp98DUlMvKrM5jA/3kv/qfaGLG87TYmJjKRk1cLcwg/h3/Oj1uGZKEvuqCoISXyTEe-AnBkERK2SnAv12p2g62Uwc)** My nephew should not be an exception. He should be proof that a better world is possible -- where government and society support, invest in, and uplift people of all different abilities. From physical access in public space, to investment in early intervention and education, to accommodations at work and every other aspect of life -- we need to ensure government and society work for people with disabilities. Our administration will reorient public services around accessibility to ensure that government works for all Marylanders -- regardless of ability. Thank you, Doug
---
[ **DONATE**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzuvBmx_NsElbwqrHgE9fa_PRZqz0tPGPsGfEUyE0OydtQsx6OBMqmbyKgg6tDtJlna655yx0cSR-r3IurXDLpJmf23luep1OoH3sS3mAGpgdoeQp2k2bxLkyuTDMSLtrH_pqmurMJnRj-rCEYWz7ykYyo5B4ZJfig7Kagnn_TVrSJ3s2os3WcZWSmVJqAgqPJOcjl_0vmLXTiVry1kY_KP0ugt0WAGRa7nw2-PHulFxhGDrfOs3JA-_D04EKIZXOFAe_5SNG88yEsffd5eew4s4C2RsE9XV8gd5VSsb284BI3iuZ_hvbLoZuUJh0D-j2uQUV8uenR_8L9lNAtT6qgo4H3CYrJl9uneEwo_TBi3JSI/3kv/qfaGLG87TYmJjKRk1cLcwg/h4/a9-_TXr3hcvEIrCI5Kk4V1OL7CxdCPYYMTEQATQfcls)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Control of the Senate hinges on Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43712821/338356789/-420428835?refcode=20220401_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzQ5MTE5Mi1hOGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UXzkauMjywjUGvJwMyru9dya2fO9T5CaTbF_cbFpA8w=) Friend - I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection this year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.** **So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[ please, split $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43712823/338356791/-392698372?refcode=20220401_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzQ5MTE5Mi1hOGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UXzkauMjywjUGvJwMyru9dya2fO9T5CaTbF_cbFpA8w=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43712824/338356792/-420428835?refcode=20220401_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzQ5MTE5Mi1hOGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UXzkauMjywjUGvJwMyru9dya2fO9T5CaTbF_cbFpA8w=)
As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: **with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.** That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. **The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:** [**Please, split a donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43712826/338356795/-392698372?refcode=20220401_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzQ5MTE5Mi1hOGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UXzkauMjywjUGvJwMyru9dya2fO9T5CaTbF_cbFpA8w=) I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43712828/338356798/-420428835?refcode=20220401_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzQ5MTE5Mi1hOGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UXzkauMjywjUGvJwMyru9dya2fO9T5CaTbF_cbFpA8w=)

clean_body: | | | = Friend - I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection this year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at POLITICO say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal. So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:= = As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat. That's why we have to fight back now – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late: = I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

| | | Peter-

This is Annamarie from House Republicans. I am on our Email Team!

Because too many Patriots like YOU refused to take action, _**we missed our goal for last quarter ... by a significant amount.**_

But all is not lost. My boss has authorized me to upgrade your matching to help us catch up because YOU are one of our top supporters and we know you wouldn't let us down again. So... _**[ACT NOW!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60017728:6dXTpmoNM:m:1:3253819041:15AF7AB987A8EB4ADD2AAF75634580E3:r "ACT NOW!")**_
**CRITICAL END OF QUARTER DEADLINE PASSED. WE FAILED!**

Annamarie

House Republicans

Hi Peter,

Let me tell you, I haven't been this worried in a long time.

Because the first end of quarter deadline of 2022 is today and as things stand right now _**House Republicans are WAY BEHIND Nancy Pelosi and her dark money machine.**_ _**[But if you chip in here. You can help close the gap>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60017728:6dXTpmoNM:m:1:3253819041:15AF7AB987A8EB4ADD2AAF75634580E3:r "But if you chip in here. You can help close the gap >>>")**_

But luckily for you, I have secured a very limited 1000% matching opportunity for a select group of patriots to help us close the gap. And I want to offer this exclusive match to you.

_**[Please don't make me regret offering this to you. | | | | | [USE YOUR 1000% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60017728:6dXTpmoNM:m:1:3253819041:15AF7AB987A8EB4ADD2AAF75634580E3:r "Generic Button")

Because the stakes right now for America and the world are too serious to be sitting on the sidelines. Since Joe Biden took office, inflation is skyhigh, gas prices are through the roof, and the world is in complete chaos.

_**[So help STOP Nancy Pelosi, House Democrats and their radical agenda by using your 1000% Match before 11:59 PM.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60017728:6dXTpmoNM:m:1:3253819041:15AF7AB987A8EB4ADD2AAF75634580E3:r "So help STOP Nancy Pelosi, House Democrats and their radical agenda by using your 1000% Match before 11:59 PM.")**_

You and I both know 2 more years of one-party rule by Biden and the Democrats will be a complete and total disaster. That's why we must act now to take back the House and renew America.

Vice President Mike Pence

Hello,
I was a three-star admiral, but when Donald Trump was elected, I voted with my feet and retired after 36 years in the U.S. Navy. Life is about choices, and I was not going to work for a demagogue such as Trump.
**Because here’s something you won’t hear anyone on Fox ‘Entertainment’ News admit: Donald J. Trump was – and is – a national security threat.**
Trump wanted to withdraw from NATO, cozied up to our enemies, and alienated our allies. He attacked our democracy and incited an armed insurrection on our Capitol. He tried to hold military aid to Ukraine hostage, and who knows what kind of _kompromat_ Russia has on him...
Twice Donald Trump was impeached. And twice Chuck Grassley stood by his side. **It’s time for my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley to stand on a bit of principle and finally repudiate any affiliation with Donald Trump. If you don't stand against him, then you stand with him.**
I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs. They’ll do nothing to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, or rein in Wall Street. And when I defeat Chuck Grassley, Iowa will be represented by the most senior military person ever-elected to the U.S. Senate. That sounds fitting right about now.
The polls show Chuck Grassley can be beaten. His approval ratings are lower than they’ve ever been. **But McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to attack me with lie-filled ads, so if I’m going to win, I need grassroots donors like you to give now.**
**We’re facing a critical deadline, and right now we’re still very short of our $25,000 goal and what we need to win and turn Iowa blue.**
[**Please, may I count on you to give $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43713271/338359412/-42398318?refcode=em20220402mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWVlNjFiOC1hZWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uwyVDvtu4ZFgguDhCSEC6ubwj6XbEh8EMXrYV56XfBE=)

She is a massive proponent of Critical Race Theory in America's schools and our judicial system. body:

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43699529/338319334/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1206-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTM5MjJlNC04ZGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nvcvfbAYZb8JEba2GISmd3A2YEjY0kPoosL6HM0i668=)

My team is starting to get worried, Peter – and as one of my supporters, there are three things I need you to know:
1\. I'm a top target of the GOP, and national Republicans have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars on attack ads against me.
2\. I wasn't able to fundraise from December through March due to regulations around legislative sessions – and now, I'm about to enter ANOTHER fundraising blackout on April 5.
**3\. I'm falling WAY short of the $150,000 I need to power my grassroots movement through this blackout, and I need your help.**
If I don't meet this goal by the end of the month, my team is worried that we won't be able to counter baseless GOP attacks against me. As Republicans push harder than ever to flip New Mexico red, I have to reach my goals every step of the way – and I can't do that without you:
**[Will you rush $15 right now to help me hit my goal this Thursday, defend myself from GOP attacks, and win reelection?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43699530/338319335/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk1206-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTM5MjJlNC04ZGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nvcvfbAYZb8JEba2GISmd3A2YEjY0kPoosL6HM0i668=) **

name: VoteVets
subject: Do you have 2 minutes for our Official Priorities Survey?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
We were hoping you might answer a few questions about your priorities for our work in the year ahead:
#
Derek -
We were hoping you might answer a few questions about your priorities for our work in the year ahead:
* How important is it that we elect progressive veterans?
* How should we prioritize protecting the House and Senate majorities?
* How important are our campaigns reaching veterans targeted by far-right disinformation?
* How important is our campaign to fight for an Iran nuclear deal?
* How important is our work to protect our public lands?

Yes. All of this work IS important, of course. But we want to know which ones YOU prioritize. So what do you say?
[**Can you PLEASE take VoteVets’ short 2 minute issue survey? Tell us how you prioritize our work for the year ahead. We’ll be checking replies this week.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/april_issues_survey/?source=em220402-1-15&t=1&akid=4878%2E3013755%2EhAZc0T)

The team at VoteVets

subject: Sign for Rob Astorino TODAY!
body:
We need your help to qualify Rob for the ballot. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/72775bb3fa74/sign-for-rob-astorino-today?e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| |
---
| |
# **We need your help. **The first step to defeating Kathy Hochul and saving our state is to qualify Rob Astorino for the ballot.

This is the final weekend. We need a strong showing and the deadline is fast approaching.

So please sign Rob's petition today!

**Below are several signing locations open today and over the next couple days where and when you can sign. ** If you're a registered Republican willing to collect a few signatures from your family and friends please reply to this email with your name and address/phone and we will also send you a petition and list of Republicans in your neighborhood.

Thank you!

Phil Oliva
Campaign Manager
Rob Astorino for Governor

***

_Signing Locations_

TODAY (9 a.m. to 12 p.m.)
160 Linden Oaks Dr.
Rochester (just off exit 23 on 490)

TODAY (10 a.m. to 1 p.m.)
258 Route 202 at Warren St.
Somers
TODAY (10 a.m. to 12 p.m.)
Lily's
112 Spring St.
South Salem TODAY (10 a.m. to 12 p.m.)
Pocket Park
Between 1136 & 1158 Pleasantville Rd.
Briarcliff Manor TODAY (10 a.m. to 3 p.m.)
Thornwood Chamber of Commerce
801 Commerce St.
Thornwood TODAY (10 a.m. to 4 p.m.)
Prel Plaza
60 Dutch Hill Rd.
Orangeburg TODAY (10 a.m. to 4 p.m.)
Teresa Kenny's Law Office
334 South Middletown Road
Nanuet TODAY (12 p.m. to 4 p.m.)
Westchester County GOP HQ
214 Mamaroneck Ave.
White Plains *** Sunday (12 p.m. to 4 p.m.)
Westchester County GOP HQ
214 Mamaroneck Ave.
White Plains *** Monday (5 p.m. to 8 p.m.)
New City Bowl and Batting Cages
90 North Main St.
New City Monday (5 p.m. to 8 p.m.)
Thornwood Chamber of Commerce
801 Commerce St.
Thornwood Monday (5 p.m. to 8 p.m.)
Hometown Premier Agency
1395 Route 44
Pleasant Valley Monday (5 p.m. to 7 p.m.)
Panera Bread
601 Troy-Schenectady Rd.
Latham

America deserves total energy independence
Patriot -- In light of Joe Biden's State of the Union address, the time has come to send a message that will echo throughout the halls of Washington: **Americans are TIRED of skyrocketing gas prices and our new dependence on foreign oil.**
**[SIGN ON: TELL BIDEN TO REINSTATE THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60015449:JFRDLmoNP:m:1:3299561967:FCBB628F39264B6CB7E0D5917F41045F:r)**
**Under President Trump, America was ENERGY INDEPENDENT!**
_Under Joe Biden, he greenlit a massive Russian pipeline and canceled the Keystone XL project ..._
You have two choices. [**1) You can sign onto our petition to restore American energy independence and lower gas prices for ALL of us...**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60015449:JFRDLmoNP:m:1:3299561967:FCBB628F39264B6CB7E0D5917F41045F:r) _Or 2) You can watch prices go EVEN HIGHER._

**BREAKING:** Trump is hosting a MASSIVE rally in Michigan TONIGHT to mobilize his followers against President Biden and Democrats!

**This is a MAJOR escalation that demands your attention.**

Trump has already been handpicking ultra-conservative candidates in battleground Senate races and hauling in millions of dollars to oppose Democrats across the country. Now, he's going state by state to defeat Democrats!

**And we could be at SERIOUS risk of losing the Senate majority that President Biden’s agenda depends on!**

If we don't come together RIGHT NOW to hit our $25,000 fundraising goal, our Democratic Senate could be LOST! Peter,
I wanted to reach out and say thank you.
This past quarter was crucial for our campaign – from our 15-county Parade, to bringing in over 400 new donors, to distributing over 1,700 yard signs across the District, to making headlines throughout local & state media.
You are helping us prove that our grassroots campaign is a force to be reckoned with.
With less than two months to go until the Democratic Primary on May 24th, we are full speed ahead into canvassing, meet & greets, voter registration & more!
If you are interested in volunteering, let my team know by clicking the link here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VGN6z1lOhkW2EkSFTGs0mw2]
Again, none of this would be possible without supporters like you. I am grateful for the folks I have around me, the ones we’ve met along the way, and the journey still to come.
Thank you for your dedicated support,
Wade Herring

body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Beto and our team just wrapped up a full month of our statewide People of
Texas campaign. Check out where Beto just met with voters and engaged with
folks in their communities over the last 30 days:

From Childress to El Paso, Beto is going to fight for every vote and write
no one off. Because in order to build a winning coalition of voters in
Texas, we have to organize in every single one of our state’s 254
counties. No place is too small, too Republican, or too anything for our
campaign to show up and put in the work to win.

your first
contribution of $3 right now to ensure we have the
