GOP leadership is FURIOUS!!!
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=1692%2E878179%2E13ZD9O)
---
**Team, Liz Cheney just made our day:** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_April/?source=VPP_20220402_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=1692%2E878179%2E13ZD9O) While we don’t always agree with Liz Cheney, **we LOVE that she isn’t afraid to hold Trump accountable for his role in the January 6th insurrection.**

_But GOP leadership is FURIOUS._ They’re ramping up their attacks on Cheney to FORCE her off the Jan. 6th Commission and to let Trump get off scot-free. [Unless 35,000 good Democrats stand with Liz Cheney by MIDNIGHT, she could fold to far-right MAGA attacks – SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_April/?source=VPP_20220402_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1692%2E878179%2E13ZD9O) | [SIGN NOW: Stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_April/?source=VPP_20220402_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1692%2E878179%2E13ZD9O)
---
* * *
Team, we’re DISGUSTED by the GOP’s leadership.

**FIRST:** Liz Cheney bravely spoke out and told Trump he’s FULLY RESPONSIBLE for the January 6th attacks on the U.S. Capitol. She’s _AMAZING!_

**THEN:** GOP leadership publicly PUNISHED Cheney in an attempt to silence her.

**NOW:** Liz Cheney is refusing to back down! Instead of bowing down to Trump, she’s following the FACTS!!
[**But she’s still facing brutal attacks – so we need 35,000 signatures to show Liz Cheney that we stand with her. Will you sign?** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_April/?source=VPP_20220402_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=1692%2E878179%2E13ZD9O)

_VPP_

name: Emily Mellits
subject: Thank you, friend
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

This month, we set a goal to support Jocelyn’s re-election campaign and make sure she has the resources she needs to win in November.
We hit our goal, friend, and for that I thank you!

This won’t be the last time you hear me talk about needing money, but I’m grateful for the time I can spend with my kids and my dog this weekend without worrying about how we’re going to fund the upcoming days of this campaign. That also means a little less stress for Dan, which is great for the rest of us at Team Benson, because if Dan isn’t happy, nobody is happy (I hope he’s not reading this).

Together, we’re going to continue building this campaign. Thank you for being a part of it, friend.

P.S. Wouldn’t be doing my job if I didn’t ask: will you sign up to support the campaign with a monthly donation? [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=040222]

-Emily

| We cannot let our foot off the gas now. Our campaign is proving that grassroots strength is a force to be reckoned with in this race. YOU are the lifeblood of our movement to kickstart Ohio’s comeback. Month after month, we grow more confident that we can win this and finally deliver the change our state needs. And, _it’s all thanks to you._ But friend, the latest poll has us tied with our primary competitor. With the primary **one month from tomorrow,** we cannot let our foot off the gas now – not when there’s so much at stake. So, if I can count on you to stick with us these last few weeks of the campaign, I promise Ohio will see brighter days ahead. John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena, are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele Rayner for Florida P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43706759/338332824/-742096553?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDk5ZmQ5My05NWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=te39rUXG28EFeXdx0ldfuLeR-lWDEzncA-b6ndcymMo=)

Peter –

I know you’ve heard from me and my team a whole bunch this past week, so I just have one more thing I want you to hear loud and clear: THANK YOU.

Our team has generated critical momentum over the past three months, and I can’t thank you enough for your support. Your involvement in this race is instrumental to our shared success.

[But the work is never over, Peter. With the GOP pledging to pour millions into our district, this race is going to be hardfought. But that’s never discouraged me from doing the right thing for Florida. subject: need input, not money 📎

body:
Team – it seems that as we start to leave this pandemic behind us, we re-enter America’s epidemic of gun violence.
Just last year there were over 693 mass shootings in the United States. Enough is enough.
It’s time for Congress to take action, and pass legislation curbing the proliferation of guns across the country.
We want to hear from you though, friend. Do you agree that Congress should pass gun control legislation at once? Take our poll and let us know >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_040222_B2_AC_30D]
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_040222_B2_AC_30D] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-no?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_040222_B2_AC_30D]
Widespread gun violence is a uniquely American phenomenon, friend, and it’s time we put an end to it.
Take our poll above, and let us know whether you support Congress passing gun control laws at once.

Friends,

I am excited to announce my endorsement of Conservative Patriot and candidate for New York’s 18th District.

_"Colin Schmitt is an impressive leader who has well served his community in both the New York State Assembly and as a Sergeant in the Army National Guard. I’m proud to endorse Colin for New York’s 18th Congressional District because Colin has the experience and conservative principles our country needs in the U.S. House of Representatives. In Congress, he will be a strong voice for his constituents in the Hudson Valley."_
| [**JOIN ME IN SUPPORTING COLIN - $50**](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=4188ff78ea0d429ba792ec3e7d2c5a1c&_e=xX0SLep15WCPiv8_ay-YlPnD0WCE8UndM5xOHY0l-N4YtmwhdZtu6VYZ_XUcMB4K--F5CBmC3dauwKV9qMexqDGPKHlLx885mCOi20_vXC2UA9PC6jddOO4GnIljPm7CMa2sk2rD9aktueLuVRGVUf3VUm-_shOt1Tbx_ZJ6MjmpVNjUv4a8LnMXv8n59ipFCKgKOQVGwvXsERF5988XF5wea7LOiPiSUG9AgtU8vlMsO8jw0E3gL9kk8XsIunZdbK8V86T-xqZMh-TpJ5OSlljLZHYsMiD8sxzijgUPoQQNXYxPqYBoYlPnEzKb2hPyN7C3dJKoIA0D7uqFc_FMbP3sTo40yhCjKGjOgehDcL9HcKqBkX0hgwKpoahOi7RubO-zUrJw_NfLbaZofvTJRi02GdgzHZNi6pZOy7vxDJVOklPKkoqnKZeZAVy8PHdRJkZtx-JRUxvGrxZH2QrjV4Zri9oynN6AdDP6dQID8WL86h9ENWl7JWjEipE0b4CF)

**_We need more candidates like Colin Schmitt to stand up for what they believe in and work tirelessly to defeat and unseat career politicians. Our party has the stamina to Take Back the House in November, but we have a lot of work to do._ **

In Congress, he will be a strong voice for his constituents in the Hudson Valley." | For years, the people of New York 18 have been under the leadership of someone who is only focused on his own political gain and special interest groups. Sean Patrick Maloney is NOT a servant of the people, he is a servant of the Far-Left. We need more candidates like Colin Schmitt to stand up for what they believe in and work tirelessly to defeat and unseat career politicians. Our party has the stamina to Take Back the House in November, but we have a lot of work to do. It starts today and it starts with you! | | ---|---|--- | | God Bless, Steve Scalise Paid for by Schmitt for Congress Our mailing address is: Schmitt For Congress PO Box 67 South Salem, NY 10590

name: American Action News
subject: The challenges the Constitution faces
body:
For years, we’ve seen a growing effort from radical activists to destroy the principles of liberty that have made our nation t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbm1s9jv54vah6mj7t7gv1uf2thj0g6e2tab2dp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjh66o32chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8chkeoqb6cbl6lo7ctll6upr1olmmiqj8cbgshgmeo70e6qe2p3mmmqr8or1e3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmed9ksupbcphkc2pm1ptgmlin49fg)
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjcmtv0rs5mbrqn5f017ivqckkbi2j4kh5kkvvm0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjh66o32chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a great day. There’s something important I want to share with you today. For years, we’ve seen a growing effort from radical activists to destroy the principles of liberty that have made our nation the freest and most prosperous in history. These radicals have found a willing ally in the Biden administration’s education department. And right now—with the help of these government bureaucrats—they are actively denigrating the U.S. Constitution in America’s schools while teaching destructive ideologies like **critical race theory** and **socialism**. We are at a key point in our history. We **must** defend our nation’s founding documents and principles of liberty through education. And that’s why I’m emailing you today.
---
| | Hillsdale College recently produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our very popular **“Constitution 101”** online course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s faculty—the same professors who teach our required course on the Constitution on campus. And when you view **“Constitution 101,”** you’ll learn about:
* The original design and purpose of the Constitution.
* The challenges it faced during the Civil War.
* How it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism.
* How limited government under the Constitution might be revived in our own time.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl1bvfvf7cldikubr95q80opinoa0fctq8updk0g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjh66o32chh2bs)
---
| | **Right now, it can be yours when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more. You can take advantage of this limited-time offer using this secure link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0mahh32b65e3puhka3jat6skboffkeh5f2hkcfg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjh66o32chh2bs)_ And when you do, you’ll not only get your own DVD box set, but you’ll help expand our national educational outreach efforts such as free online courses, classical K-12 education curriculums, and _Imprimis_ —our digest of liberty. We need your support because we REFUSE all government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. **So, please reserve your DVD box set with a gift of $100 or more using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1m9l363agnu7qba4j3vdvh5pcq99c6ldvftfeao_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjh66o32chh2bs) And remember, as I mentioned above, supplies are limited, so be sure to reserve your copy today. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Rob Ortt
subject: Press Release: BROCKPORT ‘BACK THE BLUE’ RALLY HELD TO PROTEST COP-KILLER CAMPUS SPEAKING EVENT
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
Saturday, April 2, 2022
| | | |
---
---
|
---
| |
---
| Brockport 'Back The Blue' Rally Held to Protest Cop-Killer Campus Speaking Event
---
---
BROCKPORT, NY - New York Republican Leader Rob Ortt, Former NYPD Deputy Inspector and current candidate for New York Lieutenant Governor Alison Esposito, and members of the Brockport Community stood inside the Brockport Area Veterans' Club today to show an unwavering commitment to supporting law enforcement and protest a speaking event featuring convicted cop-killer Anthony Bottom (AKA Jalil Muntaqim).
Hundreds of attendees - ranging from residents of the Village of Brockport to Law Enforcement officials - stood as one to show a strong rejection to SUNY Brockport hosting cop-killer Anthony Bottom for a speaking event and advertising him as a "political prisoner." Other attendees included former State Senator Joe Robach, former Brockport Police Chief Daniel Varrenti, Monroe County Legislator Jackie Smith, Monroe County Legislator Frank Allkofer, and candidates for State Senate James VanBrederode, Len Morrell, and Congressional candidate La'Ron Singletary.
"It's absolutely disgusting, shameful, and intellectually dishonest for SUNY Brockport to let a convicted cop-killer - pretending to be a 'political prisoner' - speak at a campus event and get paid to do it. It's tone-deaf to the Brockport community's actual overwhelming support for law enforcement. That's why we stood together to show our full support for those who protect us. Our rally's message today is clear: We Back the Blue and their families, and unequivocally reject cop-killer Anthony Bottom's speaking event today," said Leader Rob Ortt.
"SUNY Brockport allowing convicted cop-killer Anthony Bottom to speak at their taxpayer-funded school is shameful. This gaslighting and enabling of a cold-blooded murderer is an insult to the memory of the two NYPD officers he killed. It's a slap in the face to my law enforcement brothers and sisters to call him a 'political prisoner,' it twists the knife even further for the victims' loved ones and families they left behind, and it is a disservice to SUNY Brockport students. I am proud to stand with the Brockport Community and fellow members of Law Enforcement in demanding SUNY Brockport cancel this shameful event," said Alison Esposito, a former NYPD Deputy Inspector and current candidate for New York Lieutenant Governor.
"The SUNY Brockport campus event and what is stated on their website is unbelievable. Anthony Bottom is claiming to be a 'political prisoner' - no mention that he assassinated and killed two police officers, my husband and Waverly Jones. This is an outrage. He is a killer of police officers. The invitation needs to be rescinded. My message to the SUNY Brockport students is this: Police officers are there to protect you, when you see an officer just remember that they are a husband, a wife, a brother, a sister, a son, a daughter, a cousin. And they are there to protect you from all of your surroundings," said Diane Piagentini, widow of fallen NYPD Officer Joseph Piagentini. [Watch the full video of Diane Piagentini here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mYPI37zd_Tv-6o2naL1QDDp2NJHyNHoTJY92bElENM7_5B9tNAlFpaJephO0_QDxq-OHneMBI14eY-FCejN_iz_ziXTUpBk-68RmrtYGQeadpuXIsOvm-Pyxu5imNM1hE3IVi2GX15DLHzmV3PFIfw==&c=t31DVXkoSlQKW7TlG5lFMb8sQY2lln_6_Ev03pjyhwMMW8vP1M8lUA==&ch=1wLpKPJr-50t1aQtD9He9S5Hn5jxanfTWB1CFceALpCV7hP9TfkTmg==)
"The event with Anthony Bottom, if it proceeds as planned, or even if it's canceled, is a huge disservice to all active and retired police officers. As if that isn't bad enough it's an event that provides a stage so a convicted murderer can trample the memories of Officers Waverly and Piagentini, the two police officers he killed in cold blood and cause their families to have to relive the horrors of their deaths. Make no mistake: this event is an example of the anti-police philosophy that is promoted by the college President Heidi Macpherson and embraced by the SUNY interim Chancellor Deborah Stanley, and Governor Kathy Hochul. The college and all those responsible for creating and allowing this event should be ashamed of themselves," said Professor Daniel Varrenti, former Brockport Police Chief and former President of the Monroe County Association of Chiefs of Police.
"SUNY Brockport providing a convicted cop-killer the platform to further advance his heinous lies of political imprisonment is simply repulsive. Anthony Bottom is no victim and no political prisoner - he is the murderer in the ambush execution of two dedicated New York City police officers. This event is disrespectful to the families of Bottom's victims and all members of law enforcement and their Brockport students. I am proud to stand with all those in our community who share in this rightful indignation," said Legislator Frank Allkofer, 4th Legislative District of Monroe County.
"SUNY Brockport's choice to give a platform to convicted and unrepentant cop-killer Anthony Bottom is a betrayal of the trust that students, parents and New York State taxpayers have placed in this publicly funded institution. The brutal assassination of first responders should never be elevated or codoned. Clearly, the SUNY faculty and administration members involved in this event have been stuck in the faculty lounge far too long, and have lost touch with the real men and women that make this country work," said Supervisor Ken Johnson, Town of Sweden.
Today's protest comes in reaction to SUNY Brockport inviting convicted cop-killer Anthony Bottom to speak at a campus-sponsored event. In 1971, Bottom lured, ambushed, and murdered NYPD officers Waverly Jones and Joseph Piagentini. In 2020, he was [granted parole](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mYPI37zd_Tv-6o2naL1QDDp2NJHyNHoTJY92bElENM7_5B9tNAlFpaJephO0_QDxhkHqFvlSQ7njyNscalfUGzimVdY4ZP4J0miINubwdE_x0ajt92Z59zZIT0odICPhQJIlUsSDOpnPaZoPh9csZkHAVZnbcWBBt-d_0NyM5QKmahQcW9JJGK-qa6gzXLccIz6YkA7jWWOCBs1qhlI4_LH1ThwCFL7p3_XTcjXUb9LVL_QNHO4sNOjqfSn7KS4ptSpLkx4PKng5EoB5mrBRKA==&c=t31DVXkoSlQKW7TlG5lFMb8sQY2lln_6_Ev03pjyhwMMW8vP1M8lUA==&ch=1wLpKPJr-50t1aQtD9He9S5Hn5jxanfTWB1CFceALpCV7hP9TfkTmg==). SUNY Brockport's website [advertised](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mYPI37zd_Tv-6o2naL1QDDp2NJHyNHoTJY92bElENM7_5B9tNAlFpaJephO0_QDxFKBWA9axN5bX_ZGRFqKMHkdB6et0wlxmjNEs5Ve6E0EGvhPX67jKHYIWBjIrGaeFZzTCSAqipX6skauH4QYzmsoDRyAcwojp5v6sFexBIRiuuuKMiHST5h_NTGJzccwgTe8tyzd3XmmeTX234m8cXliPy9WfhSDx9hYfwliqmX0qax7O1J96TlOyb_dtUCDtdvtgeVj_nK7pNUpsfzhMCRPUVLimOJ4dWKFV7tZWjh6-M-e9eIyn9V-ojrkdRzFb&c=t31DVXkoSlQKW7TlG5lFMb8sQY2lln_6_Ev03pjyhwMMW8vP1M8lUA==&ch=1wLpKPJr-50t1aQtD9He9S5Hn5jxanfTWB1CFceALpCV7hP9TfkTmg==) the event as "an intellectual conversation on [Anthony Bottom's] time with the Black Panthers and serving nearly 50 years as a political prisoner." The taxpayer-funded university originally planned to pay cop-killer Anthony Bottom for the speaking event and has [refused to rescind the invitation](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mYPI37zd_Tv-6o2naL1QDDp2NJHyNHoTJY92bElENM7_5B9tNAlFpaJephO0_QDxUw1TOFKAlmVbPgrcycKP3zH33H5RAh71D8L3Cq_Ivc8OJn3P0o9yCkhkEMc8ilGxN98xjWavhLwaRqs6OA2Uvka_QdeV9hmVqv7TitAhgsumPT9VO5yU9hmmb0Igc2nVWQLcsmvlorPb01SBSZTFG6l0vgnogACc0G2f2k64olGLU6sq2Xhq1-ysdeVAZpfIQfD-xgWZ3-4QC1u_tg4fUA==&c=t31DVXkoSlQKW7TlG5lFMb8sQY2lln_6_Ev03pjyhwMMW8vP1M8lUA==&ch=1wLpKPJr-50t1aQtD9He9S5Hn5jxanfTWB1CFceALpCV7hP9TfkTmg==). An anonymous donor has ensured the cop-killer [will get paid](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mYPI37zd_Tv-6o2naL1QDDp2NJHyNHoTJY92bElENM7_5B9tNAlFpaJephO0_QDx86mHepcPCPXf2zFbNIFFndqFQNxBtSXtm7e032kOoiJ-Xq1UlWZKoXBeTdIeZwX-pBdHZZmDJWGj75gkGHk58dKTfy2lQ6QSeQhewsWmYbMMnJsi3jU8swjjtX7KGb9JLO-o7cuW18Xx6v9rnGGJ1Zgm9Dfxmq2wHpN7fYnpSSsiIgbsndIzUQ==&c=t31DVXkoSlQKW7TlG5lFMb8sQY2lln_6_Ev03pjyhwMMW8vP1M8lUA==&ch=1wLpKPJr-50t1aQtD9He9S5Hn5jxanfTWB1CFceALpCV7hP9TfkTmg==) for the speaking event, which is now virtual.
Last month, Leader Ortt [penned a letter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mYPI37zd_Tv-6o2naL1QDDp2NJHyNHoTJY92bElENM7_5B9tNAlFpaJephO0_QDxLaO_ke0nBH4KKmKrofpzJ1RuUXRnNbcOqWcYH8ifnQqoruBbEMVnqWnD4A9f2zbg6xdszL8GyGo4LwPbBzPOEUlLMMDs1WoUy3yplL_mmk3hUCpp0607cZeKz8kX4wby8uCGagbPgAZ4l3lDsAl9mVLMA1Qox8qPpMhMk4JYYh-nejmNSRKKzE1QoOtyQtsOnFt9Im-eAl8B3r-BDYuDVA==&c=t31DVXkoSlQKW7TlG5lFMb8sQY2lln_6_Ev03pjyhwMMW8vP1M8lUA==&ch=1wLpKPJr-50t1aQtD9He9S5Hn5jxanfTWB1CFceALpCV7hP9TfkTmg==) to the SUNY Brockport President calling on the school to rescind the speaking invitation for Anthony Bottom. "I ask you to consider those students who have fathers, mothers, brothers, sisters, grandparents or any family member in law enforcement, and rescind Anthony Bottom's invitation to speak on campus," wrote Leader Ortt.
###
---
| |
---
| PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
---

---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mYPI37zd_Tv-6o2naL1QDDp2NJHyNHoTJY92bElENM7_5B9tNAlFpUmHWbuqsbC-KgbmbrhosR5jmL7joHHy95G1IT8XB-jy9wYhTRReCh6z1IydMgyP_eoOdBdXYCX3InEiBWkyvevq3ZlWEPEMG6G_ifu3B7sV0F-Y0Mpa4-k=&c=t31DVXkoSlQKW7TlG5lFMb8sQY2lln_6_Ev03pjyhwMMW8vP1M8lUA==&ch=1wLpKPJr-50t1aQtD9He9S5Hn5jxanfTWB1CFceALpCV7hP9TfkTmg==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mYPI37zd_Tv-6o2naL1QDDp2NJHyNHoTJY92bElENM7_5B9tNAlFpUmHWbuqsbC-HDmyy8nntlCwB4mvGuZsl6QbBHpPU47gYkaEyOVpxTR1UUnmQXsh6T__fbe6sz_d_pnT7wue6s7fJoLa7LfBLwecOxhUnhJW&c=t31DVXkoSlQKW7TlG5lFMb8sQY2lln_6_Ev03pjyhwMMW8vP1M8lUA==&ch=1wLpKPJr-50t1aQtD9He9S5Hn5jxanfTWB1CFceALpCV7hP9TfkTmg==)

name: Rick Scott
subject: I’m under attack by the radical left
body:
Peter, I wouldn’t be asking you for help if it wasn’t urgent.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43714744/338366943/985656403?refcode=em_msg_2022.04.02_b1_es_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2FhYzUyMi1iOWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UB4-9Y5UhLSucpPLRxncWXb2vJ3qkFOuWBEWpUGXhk=)
We did it, Peter: We surpassed our first FEC goal of our campaign!

I am so incredibly grateful to everyone who chipped in to make it happen. I am fighting every day for the place I have always called home, and to see the way this community came together in support of that fight blew me away. **I never doubted we could do it, but I’m still humbled nonetheless.**

This is the first time the public will be able to peer into the inner strength of our campaign, and because of you they will see a force to be reckoned with. We had one shot to make a strong first impression, and we stepped up and knocked it out of the park.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you Peter!

Emilia
---

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen?=
subject: Making Healthcare More Affordable
body:
Republicans Side with Big Pharma Over You! | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=4f68ea25c7&e=4712f71bea)
---
| Last week, the House took a major step toward making healthcare more affordable. Only 12 Republicans crossed the aisle to vote with Democrats to lower insulin costs. The bill, if passed by the Senate, will give substantial benefits to the over 30 million Americans living with diabetes.

Of course, our representative, Ronny Jackson, voted with the majority of Republicans and with big pharma against the American people.

I’m the primary caregiver for my elderly mom. I know how important affordable and accessible healthcare is, especially for our seniors and especially for their prescriptions. But lower costs will **__benefit all of us__** __.__ That’s why it’s one of the major reasons I’m running.

Can you chip in $5 today and help me send Ronny a message that I’m coming for his job? Because it’s about time you had a representative that **REPRESENTS YOU – and not big pharma and other corporate interests!**

name: Jordan Rogers, John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: John Fetterman would be the 51st vote to decriminalize weed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
An update in the fight for weed justice.
#
HEY, Derek!
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46292?refcode=em20220402-5231&t=1&akid=5231%2E434096%2EJfYWN4)
If we haven’t met yet, I’m Jordan, and I’m John Fettermans’s Cannabis Coalition Director.
**Today, I’m coming to you with a major announcement.** Yesterday, the U.S House passed the MORE Act to decriminalize weed. AMAZING, right?
Except... we already know that the Senate isn’t going to vote the same way (if they even bring this up for a vote at all).
There are a MILLION reasons why I 100% believe John should be the next U.S. Senator from PA, but right now, my number one reason is this:
**John would be the 51st vote the Senate needs to decriminalize weed in the United States.** Unlike flip-flopping Conor Lamb, who voted for the very legislation he voted AGAINST in the last Congress, you’ll never have to guess where John stands on legalizing weed.
[**From Pennsylvania to the U.S. Senate, your donation powers our fight for legal weed and an end to the racist War on Drugs. So what do you say, Derek, will you chip in $4.20 — or ANY amount — to support our fight to send John to the U.S. Senate?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46293?refcode=em20220402-5231&t=2&akid=5231%2E434096%2EJfYWN4)
**[DONATE $4.20 »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46293?refcode=em20220402-5231&t=3&akid=5231%2E434096%2EJfYWN4)**
This isn’t an issue John has had to “evolve” on, Derek.
**First,** back in 2016 when other Democrats running for Senate in PA were afraid to go bold on the issue of legal weed, John was a lone voice for full legalization of marijuana, regardless of any political consequences.
**Then,** in 2018, John *again* chose to make legal weed a key campaign priority in his race for Lt. Governor — something that most other Democrats usually shy away from to this day. (BTW, he and Governor Wolf went on to earn the highest number of votes ever won as a ticket in a Pennsylvania gubernatorial election.)
**Now,** in his current role as Lt. Governor, John has established an expedited review process for pardons for low-level cannabis charges. _These pardons have helped hundreds of deserving Pennsylvanians get their lives back after unjust, racist, and inhumane drug policies ripped them away._
Look, most Senate candidates don’t make legal weed a central part of their campaign platform, but John has. Because it’s not just about making weed safe and accessible for medicinal and recreational use. It’s about righting the racial injustice of Black Americans being nearly 4x more likely than white Americans to be arrested for marijuana.
**[Will you help us send John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate so we can finally decriminalize weed, end the racist War on Drugs, and make this country a little bit greener?🌿](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46292?refcode=em20220402-5231&t=4&akid=5231%2E434096%2EJfYWN4)**
**[DONATE »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46292?refcode=em20220402-5231&t=23&akid=5231%2E434096%2EJfYWN4)**
Thank you SO much for your support,
Jordan
Jordan Rogers
Cannabis Coalition Leader
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220402-5231-footer&t=24&refcode2=5231_434096_JfYWN4&akid=5231%2E434096%2EJfYWN4)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=5231%2E434096%2EJfYWN4)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=5231%2E434096%2EJfYWN4)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

clean_body: Holly McCormack has what it takes to win = Peter, We’ll make this quick. We’re less than 60 days away from the primary, and Holly is barnstorming the district connecting with voters. We’re hearing over and over again that when voters in the district hear from Holly, they think she’s the best candidate to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. We need to increase our budget to get more direct mail in voters' hands and to help Holly criss-cross the district to reach as many voters as possible. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = Thanks for all of your support, Team Holly McCormack || || Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States ** | Paid for by Holly for Congress

name: Matt Jacobs for Congress
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
I wanted to share some quick updates from the campaign trail. [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=34175b5ef6044e24a380ac9c8f0d936b&_e=Tfb66_T1e4VbeRFEdkjA-uvsykwpI-cizlyt1oVBfagscSJ7NZddfYV91SI5zhTm1APqz7aNmNu4ZTWIIXmTLFK-FAEndc3IrJCcWiCoL25ahZGnj2L8df8BQUuUd2qDvdXP1CFp0v5k_ZRqS2jHTNSdcuzCKUHyQ9GGuuVqkLHfpeKc-F-Aly6_QObMsT-M42rCLSwb1YvE1IrihuJ9v7s356KGU3cbVmgllPgV9fEDCSyFX9rf4srQ9etA6uhuTvNLfldQs2frmUNASGhIVaUA_d-uNP19TFbKdoJgSSq6-vVTZPYJdqz88-N__ny5NXWyseQjCdlVdhzrhoYC39os6bqOnpPI1EV9MS5i72ke4nK7Wnck1_Ckc7ci0LaBbsbzp1X9hXzmcXmPG0_0Q1cOmvawoFjnEw5IwbtOXlY%3D) Happy weekend everyone! I wanted to share some quick updates from the campaign trail over the past week or so. We had a blast last weekend at our BBQ Bash at the Waters Family Farm in Moorpark! Agriculture is a vitally important part of our economy, history and way of life here in Ventura County – and I’m very grateful to have the strong support of CA-26 farmers and ranchers. Thank you to the Waters family and everyone else who made this event such a success! Living room meet-and-greets are a great way to get to know community members and the issues they care about. Thank you to the Parsons for hosting us at your beautiful home in Oak Park! I was grateful for the opportunity to speak at the Thousand Oaks Republican Women Federated candidate forum this week. As someone who was born and raised in Thousand Oaks, it was particularly meaningful speaking at this event. Thank you to Beatrice Restifo and Rosemary Licata (two pillars of our community) for the kind invitation! I’ve been honored to receive a number of endorsements recently, including from former California Governor Pete Wilson and the Port Hueneme Police Officers’ Association. I’d like to thank the Governor for his support – and the members of the Port Hueneme Police Department for everything you do to keep our community safe. We had some special family milestones this week. Julie and I celebrated our 9th anniversary (throwback photo of my beautiful, ageless bride below). And our son Alex celebrated his 5th birthday with friends and a “real live Jedi” at Triunfo Park in Westlake. (Hat tip to Conejo Recreation and Park District for doing such a great job with the new playground there.) March ended on a very positive note. Thanks to our extremely generous supporters, we had our best fundraising quarter yet! More on that to come soon. And just in case you missed it...on Wednesday, **the** **National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) put CA-26 in their National Target List!** That’s a testament to our incredibly hard work on the campaign trail over the past 15 months – and a clear signal that we are on the path to victory in November! [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=34175b5ef6044e24a380ac9c8f0d936b&_e=Tfb66_T1e4VbeRFEdkjA-qR9x0GLRybIVaSowyQBYbUkxTZWj04hSdBKg3Ng2qDlNVM9_wl4PB5gC5I_p4TTrriAyHhJrzHb9bkMuqxWtUtla4FT63jAQiS4tGKxBqcSHtRgml3bwwH7V7QDjs1YsyFtECaul6VZjzN_LBASIsKBSiGyYunybRCUW5I2mw7v2LhTvNkdq71SOOMmw8bV9YvgtRbKvWkCKpTO-WTLeFCTx_hfuSYeBL-C19yiS329ptqHavilCszbZP5u4xoscwJIZJFQQ6SSrUWZyt6JlzrvNr25MQzYZG410IGctpYECVZ19x05xjsW3xq8FkARudnYH-m4WI7WpdUarzY0WDI%3D) If you’d like a lawn sign, come pick one up at our Headquarters at 1362 Thousand Oaks Blvd. Or shoot us an email ([info@mattjacobsforcongress.com](mailto:info@mattjacobsforcongress.com)) and we’ll bring one to you. Thank you for reading and enjoy your weekend. Sincerely, Matt [**DONATE ONCE**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=34175b5ef6044e24a380ac9c8f0d936b&_e=Tfb66_T1e4VbeRFEdkjA-vBqvE3DTHGgd7KDV-Iq0TxFkacl7W3fdeC0wGaTf1ShFTDnHHeU_myuHnrsnX8K8QWXNP7dqfkehtOFzOVsEocJ60d_t_JwIGXiubp2M7oktB9PNr3Qfdm9WApQZIRmbmqpDv0QtxgdNwKFCpiv_hc4GU0GzrmrmVR2AwFqD5nwQkc1oX-9ap5ydLDTGl2ltICafHSFRSyziIfi12QVGnBE5U0pma4GVB93y3Ex-iiYCWodWLWYCSBn_x44KI6qKnd1Zf_C2ArMDbKI1ZwwUARIoQKLDoqh4fQpJ-m49KAFBWeYpcRGSVjJD_hgedIEhoss1fyja4_Esj_UOMt25OjuaF_YI-Kusj6tyYSczI1-dPHtyNZd5I4XuE896DhZtcxQv7vnfDiLClfsHy_EZxEMl5GSr3MMGsFCFbnhOvnGwos_s3W5iA6ar4dz1tilfA%3D%3D) Thank you to the Waters family and everyone else who made this event such a success! Living room meet-and-greets are a great way to get to know community members and the issues they care about. Thank you to the Parsons for hosting us at your beautiful home in Oak Park! I was grateful for the opportunity to speak at the Thousand Oaks Republican Women Federated candidate forum this week. As someone who was born and raised in Thousand Oaks, it was particularly meaningful speaking at this event. Thank you to Beatrice Restifo and Rosemary Licata (two pillars of our community) for the kind invitation! I’ve been honored to receive a number of endorsements recently, including from former California Governor Pete Wilson and the Port Hueneme Police Officers’ Association. I’d like to thank the Governor for his support – and the members of the Port Hueneme Police Department for everything you do to keep our community safe. We had some special family milestones this week. Julie and I celebrated our 9th anniversary (throwback photo of my beautiful, ageless bride below). And our son Alex celebrated his 5th birthday with friends and a “real live Jedi” at Triunfo Park in Westlake. (Hat tip to Conejo Recreation and Park District for doing such a great job with the new playground there.) March ended on a very positive note. Thanks to our extremely generous supporters, we had our best fundraising quarter yet! More on that to come soon. And just in case you missed it...on Wednesday, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) put CA-26 in their National Target List! That’s a testament to our incredibly hard work on the campaign trail over the past 15 months – and a clear signal that we are on the path to victory in November! If you’d like a lawn sign, come pick one up at our Headquarters at 1362 Thousand Oaks Blvd. Or shoot us an email (mailto:info@mattjacobsforcongress.com) and we’ll bring one to you. Thank you for reading and enjoy your weekend. Sincerely, Matt | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions are subject to the limits and prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals or federal government contractors are prohibited. We must use our best efforts to obtain and maintain the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per calendar year. An individual or non-multicandidate PAC may contribute $2,900 for an election. A multicandidate PAC may contribute $5,000 per election. P.O. Box 4723 3435 E. Thousand Oaks Blvd, Thousand Oaks, CA 91359

You’ve probably seen disturbing headlines about attacks on our law enforcement and the Democratic party’s calls to defund our police......... Peter, You’ve probably seen disturbing headlines about attacks on our law enforcement and the Democratic party’s calls to defund our police. **[At times like these, it’s more important than ever that we show our support for our dedicated law enforcement. If you agree, will you sign your name and stand with me to Back the Blue?](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=62914cd47a62439f9c071ae0eef4a4d7&_e=--hBXvXl7HXUPr0XvZd0dNirrXYrQnnjIfXKmICRDqIktjvDjliM2V5qtKZ_mZOAvJ42cHrh0RXr1Le28uvc-LJ-KO1aQ_is8aEQh8kZhz7izKgB0An4kZIiso_DJgFCm-gnsbxAdvPG8tRCfLqOuvTw9xdpVqhUUdEA8VYyCdl0s0rJGPwO82PRvwlelHALKPn2RWg0WYgPrwrpFHafzvXxoHFgaUAIhQ5tKwxttbEfp1pGq1GLxMt7WKmoODzRcNZxyfpzI96PHnXdH-YNLJIDXTEQN8pz6d-rgin2Va9TspGfzvdUVHjsxmfsf3VTCZKxY4BvvnAY6R8UACKfp_cay-NIb77dt7DM0wtEjH-tnG4qK3kq4FCtCt5-9XhLMgoWrClYEkra_B__RcJGdH1f2NlEmxGUA15LciQtUynIdpNjd_InK5PoYr-EhOSyhI29K31B8dFkq-JZjxB8CCxWavD4XwbgUGWItV9egvB2Q4uRZA5UUpOidy36tRiP)** [**SIGN YOUR NAME**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=62914cd47a62439f9c071ae0eef4a4d7&_e=--hBXvXl7HXUPr0XvZd0dNirrXYrQnnjIfXKmICRDqIktjvDjliM2V5qtKZ_mZOAvJ42cHrh0RXr1Le28uvc-LJ-KO1aQ_is8aEQh8kZhz7izKgB0An4kZIiso_DJgFCm-gnsbxAdvPG8tRCfLqOuvTw9xdpVqhUUdEA8VYyCdl0s0rJGPwO82PRvwlelHALKPn2RWg0WYgPrwrpFHafzvXxoHFgaUAIhQ5tKwxttbEfp1pGq1GLxMt7WKmoODzRcNZxyfpzI96PHnXdH-YNLJIDXTEQN8pz6d-rgin2Va-CuNzDAX03kqLqImWm3uwqdBS1BXoGWTSis4honWbbHCQ3BP0h41G4scnXMOlvRM8wkhBovHNA-qvaNRsXi6Y2lWiQ7BXDY0XTvOj8SnA2eVkdXX5E5Bw0C72BWHsYmp-hhCNY0HCd2nMrohvyx6glxg33BJP6Y4tbpHE-efAC9nCRIf0KdHRx2cE61IKYWf55t2B0MWIQO0wpMl1WY6Kj) Unfortunately, a lot of this anti-police sentiment has crept into our own state. Even our own governor has worked against our law enforcement by eliminating qualified immunity. That means police officers can now be sued PERSONALLY, even by the criminals they arrest! Think about it, Peter... Michelle Lujan Grisham has failed to end catch and release which sends dangerous offenders back out onto our streets. She’s refused to secure our southern borders, opening the floodgates for violent criminals and dangerous illegal drugs to pour into our state. **
****Like I mentioned earlier, she also ended qualified immunity for law enforcement. These brave men and women risk their lives day after day to keep us safe, and Michelle Lujan Grisham turned her back on them. It’s outrageous!** It’s important to me that we hold Lujan Grisham accountable for her anti-law enforcement policies and stand together to show our police that real New Mexicans still have their backs. **[Will you help show that New Mexico still Backs the Blue and values public safety by signing your name in support of our law enforcement?](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=62914cd47a62439f9c071ae0eef4a4d7&_e=--hBXvXl7HXUPr0XvZd0dNirrXYrQnnjIfXKmICRDqIktjvDjliM2V5qtKZ_mZOAvJ42cHrh0RXr1Le28uvc-LJ-KO1aQ_is8aEQh8kZhz7izKgB0An4kZIiso_DJgFCm-gnsbxAdvPG8tRCfLqOuvTw9xdpVqhUUdEA8VYyCdl0s0rJGPwO82PRvwlelHALKPn2RWg0WYgPrwrpFHafzvXxoHFgaUAIhQ5tKwxttbEfp1pGq1GLxMt7WKmoODzRcNZxyfpzI96PHnXdH-YNLJIDXTEQN8pz6d-rgin2Va_mh_ykMsSXpEltZ1VXGEL4STWHQUqfm2mxcC-TxP4QYYYmPGlMM5Jzcx-GNCF-fjuU9_gzMBZHI6ghPXH9_dDTTWmjj01aiI53uqDzZB1PdUQ7A6TobO7YrktTCB7yQxEjGB8eevY0-rBnwaVoxbcEGKjULREkZNukJ5sZJbjFpm8DfGTZWnxxgjuWhvz49P2qJz4uiMM-SUZ1ScsY3Fst)** While Michelle Lujan Grisham is working AGAINST our public safety, I’m all about working WITH our police to help them keep our communities safe.
**If you support our brave law enforcement and think our leaders should support them too,**[**sign your name and stand with me to Back the Blue.**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=62914cd47a62439f9c071ae0eef4a4d7&_e=--hBXvXl7HXUPr0XvZd0dNirrXYrQnnjIfXKmICRDqIktjvDjliM2V5qtKZ_mZOAvJ42cHrh0RXr1Le28uvc-LJ-KO1aQ_is8aEQh8kZhz7izKgB0An4kZIiso_DJgFCm-gnsbxAdvPG8tRCfLqOuvTw9xdpVqhUUdEA8VYyCdl0s0rJGPwO82PRvwlelHALKPn2RWg0WYgPrwrpFHafzvXxoHFgaUAIhQ5tKwxttbEfp1pGq1GLxMt7WKmoODzRcNZxyfpzI96PHnXdH-YNLJIDXTEQN8pz6d-rgin2Va_Zprhk4CPjYEg7blqd_0BAZEmcmBAkDRR3kBuvWUTe4u6ffafaTeM_-mazJxdoW51VQlVBShCgBTJMP2ilrvpbOrq4Ogh2hZ3vm--wGQEpTlU7YwjKDB3wvbnIHfXovZfd6AYBPHj-MvtYBWeU9GKDSIQuKNlCvgsDPqF6zWF2Dc4Enh3tygLKJXR83o8V6CqeRDkZrUnHXqHlPM9XR4hh) clean_body: You’ve probably seen disturbing headlines about attacks on our law enforcement and the Democratic party’s calls to defund our police......... Peter, You’ve probably seen disturbing headlines about attacks on our law enforcement and the Democratic party’s calls to defund our police. Unfortunately, a lot of this anti-police sentiment has crept into our own state. Even our own governor has worked against our law enforcement by eliminating qualified immunity. That means police officers can now be sued PERSONALLY, even by the criminals they arrest! Think about it, Peter... Michelle Lujan Grisham has failed to end catch and release which sends dangerous offenders back out onto our streets. She’s refused to secure our southern borders, opening the floodgates for violent criminals and dangerous illegal drugs to pour into our state. Like I mentioned earlier, she also ended qualified immunity for law enforcement. These brave men and women risk their lives day after day to keep us safe, and Michelle Lujan Grisham turned her back on them. It’s outrageous! It’s important to me that we hold Lujan Grisham accountable for her anti-law enforcement policies and stand together to show our police that real New Mexicans still have their backs. While Michelle Lujan Grisham is working AGAINST our public safety, I’m all about working WITH our police to help them keep our communities safe. If you support our brave law enforcement and think our leaders should support them too, This is all about keeping our families safe and respecting the people who put their lives on the line to serve our communities. It’s hard to believe that things have gotten to this point, but it’s why our efforts to Back the Blue are so important now more than ever before. Thanks, Mark Ronchetti | | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. Please send checks to Mark Ronchetti for Governor. 8100 Wyoming Blvd. NE Ste - M4, Box 225 Albuquerque, NM 87113 Click to unsubscribe.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43715306/338371702/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk881-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2YzMDEyZS1jMGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mfjlubt02j8sZPlFvZKck5S5Q9iL-GTzkKe735zt_QY=)

**Peter, ****105 years ago today, Jeannette Rankin, the first woman ever elected to Congress, was sworn into office – and America was changed forever.**
We've come a long way since 1917, but we've got a lot further to go before we reach true gender equality on Capitol Hill. Rep. Rankin is STILL the only woman to _ever_ represent Montana in Congress!
That's why it's so important that we support trailblazing candidates like Abby Finkenauer. Right now, Abby's running to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA) – and if she wins, she'll make history. Abby's no stranger to groundbreaking campaigns. She became one of the first women to ever represent Iowa in the House of Representatives in 2019 and was the youngest woman ever to flip a congressional seat from red to blue!
Abby's nowhere near done fighting for families in Iowa and making history along the way. **When she defeats Sen. Grassley in November, she'll become the youngest woman EVER elected to the Senate. **
Sen. Grassley is a seven-term incumbent and the GOP has $41 MILLION in the bank to protect vulnerable Republicans like him. Even though he's facing record-high disapproval ratings and only 27% of likely Iowa voters said they want to reelect him, Abby still needs a powerful grassroots movement behind her to break through this glass ceiling and win. **Building that kind of campaign starts with people like you, Peter.**

**A federal judge has ruled it was "more likely than not" that former president Donald Trump violated the law and "corruptly attempted to obstruct" Congress when he incited an insurrection on our Capitol and tried to overturn the results of the 2020 election.**
The judge's ruling also cleared the release of documents from Trump's co-conspirator in his post-election Big Lie, attorney John Eastman. These documents will be reviewed by the bipartisan committee investigating the Jan. 6 insurrection and will likely embolden the case for the disgraced former President facing criminal charges.
In his ruling, the federal judge likened former President Trump and Eastman's plan to "a coup in search of a legal theory," noting that it spurred "violent attacks."
This is a significant development. And what is becoming clear is that the conspiracy-laden house of cards that Donald Trump and his sycophants built to overturn a democratic election is collapsing quickly. But you know as well as I do that - even after such an unequivocal ruling from a federal judge about Trump's potentially criminal acts - Republicans in Congress and on Fox News will do everything they can to sweep this ruling under the rug.
**That means it 's up to us to maintain the drumbeat for full accountability - and it's beyond critical that you, Friend, as a highly engaged Democrat, speak out to demand accountability under the law for Donald Trump.**
**Tonight, I need 5,000 members of this team to speak out before midnight. Even if you 've taken action before, I'm counting on your response again in light of this new ruling: [Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump for un-American attempts to overthrow our democratic election?](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-march-trump-accountability?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1163-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Folks here in NC-04 agree on a lot: That people should be able to afford basic healthcare. That housing should be a basic right. And that we want a livable planet for our children.

But there is one thing that divides us. Pits neighbor against neighbor, child against parents, friend against friend. 👀

_And that is which of two college basketball powerhouses in the district, UNC or Duke, folks swear their allegiance to._

**What everyone can agree on, is that all eyes will be on the historic UNC vs. Duke Final Four faceoff TONIGHT.** [**_I come to you with exciting news! With your support, we have secured our spot to air our first ever TV ad during the game. But the work doesn’t stop here, and we need to raise $6,290 to cover our next TV spot! Will you pitch in $27 right now to fund our next ad? >>_**](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/0THhQzxUULhVWtlLQlSA0g~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkKwXsP0TJaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDQwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9nYW1lZGF5X2VuJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTI3RmFEcWNnS3NyVjFqZmdya0ZIb1RMNnp1MyZyZWZjb2RlMj0yN0ZhRHFjZ0tzclYxamZncmtGSG9UTDZ6dTMmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MjdGYURxY2dLc3JWMWpmZ3JrRkhvVEw2enUzVwNzcGNCCmI-7IBIYjzkW0RSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABw) By reaching voters with messages that they can all agree on, we’ll be launching our campaign to the next level.

**If we can pull this off and unite NC-04/my district around our message when we are divided, it could determine the outcome of this race.**

But I won’t lie: funding TV ads are expensive, and we need to raise another $6,290 to make our next ad buy and keep up this incredible momentum. clean_body: | | Folks here in NC-04 agree on a lot: That people should be able to afford basic healthcare. That housing should be a basic right. And that we want a livable planet for our children. But there is one thing that divides us. Pits neighbor against neighbor, child against parents, friend against friend. 👀 And that is which of two college basketball powerhouses in the district, UNC or Duke, folks swear their allegiance to. What everyone can agree on, is that all eyes will be on the historic UNC vs. Duke Final Four faceoff TONIGHT. By reaching voters with messages that they can all agree on, we’ll be launching our campaign to the next level. If we can pull this off and unite NC-04/my district around our message when we are divided, it could determine the outcome of this race. But I won’t lie: funding TV ads are expensive, and we need to raise another $6,290 to make our next ad buy and keep up this incredible momentum. | | | | | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ All my gratitude, Nida Allam | 6409 Fayetteville Rd Ste 120-378 Durham, NC 27713 Paid for by Nida for NC Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. The ONLY way Nida will win this race is with small grassroots donations. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please click . Peter Willis,
In state legislatures across the country, Republicans are waging a concerted effort to undermine the rights of LGBTQ+ people. And now they’re getting ready to take their dangerous agenda to Congress, with plans to turn the trans members of our communities into second-class citizens, roll back gay marriage, and pass other backwards, harmful policies.
The progressive community is fighting back. You’re invited to join Melanie and three panelists next Tuesday for a discussion on the threats to LGBTQ+ rights, and how we can take action.
**_LGBTQ+ Rights and Progressive Policy Discussion_** , with panelists:
* Anthony Arrien (he/him) Trans-identified NYS Legislative & Educational Advocate
* Gina Sanchirico (she/her) LGBTQ+ Family Advocate; Retired Teacher; Union Advocate
* Nick Haby (he/him) LGBTQ+ Organizer & New Reformers Board Member
* U.S. Congressional Candidate Melanie D’Arrigo (she/her)

**Tuesday, April 5, 7-8 pm ET

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Sharing my gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Earlier this week, we faced our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year. My team and I set an ambitious online fundraising goal to ensure we have the resources to defend my seat and our Democratic House majority this November. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43711633/338351878/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzkyZDA1Mi1hNmIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tahC0TPfPuzecy0YlC5_I21qfKmrXEDD30X-saYh6Sg=&emci=40280b40-00b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f792d052-a6b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)
---
I wanted to express my gratitude, Peter.

Earlier this week, we faced our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year. My team and I set an ambitious online fundraising goal to ensure we have the resources to defend my seat and our Democratic House majority this November.

We knew it wouldn't be easy, but this grassroots team stepped up in a huge way. **Thanks to your support – we surpassed our end-of-quarter fundraising goal!**

I can't thank you enough for your support, name/team. When our fundraising numbers are made public, national Republicans, our opponents, and their allies will see that this grassroots team is ready to take on whatever challenges come our way.

I'm incredibly grateful for your trust in me and I'm honored to have you as a part of this grassroots team. We still have a tough road ahead of us, but I'm confident if we continue working together, we can defend my seat and the House majority.

Thank you,

Kim

I can't thank you enough for your support, name/team. When our fundraising numbers are made public, national Republicans, our opponents, and their allies will see that this grassroots team is ready to take on whatever challenges come our way. I'm incredibly grateful for your trust in me and I'm honored to have you as a part of this grassroots team. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I am incredibly grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Friend,
Thanks to you, we met our ambitious end-of-quarter goal, and now folks across NY-17 and our nation will see the strength of our movement when our FEC fundraising numbers go public.
This year we’re up against Republicans who are hellbent on taking back the House to halt the progress we’ve made and further their extremist agenda.
As we speak, they’re calling up their mega-donors to bring in millions to get the job done.
As a grassroots movement, we’re powered by donors like you who chip in when you can because dark money has influenced our government for too long. I want to make NY-17 a better place for you — not corporations and special interest groups.
With every goal we hit, our team becomes stronger and continues our path toward defending my seat and ensuring we can fight for everyday Americans.
I am incredibly grateful for your support, and I look forward to working together in the days, weeks, and months ahead to build a brighter future for NY-17.
Onward,
Mondaire

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Message from Alexandra Rojas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, our
Executive Director, Alexandra Rojas, wanted to share a quick message on
the state of our races after our first victory of the year in Texas and
many more fights to come. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101092?refcode=em20220402-22686&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=22686%2E1203867%2EqFZslM ]Can you watch the 1-minute video message from
Alexandra and then chip in to elect more Justice Democrats?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101092?refcode=em20220402-22686&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=22686%2E1203867%2EqFZslM ]Picture of Alexandra Rojas with a play button

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101092?refcode=em20220402-22686&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=22686%2E1203867%2EqFZslM ]Watch & Contribute

Here’s the full message:

"Hey team, Alex Rojas here with Justice Democrats. I wanted to give a
quick State of the Race update for the 2022 cycle so far.

We are 1-0, and in overtime with one of our elections. We’ve got Greg
Casar who just won his election out in Texas’ 35th District. We’ve got
Jessica Cisneros who’s challenging one of the most corrupt, conservative
Democrats, a 17-year incumbent, in the House of Representatives in a
historic runoff on May 24th.

And that’s just the start. We’ve got Pennsylvania, we’ve got Illinois,
we’ve got New York, we’ve got Tennessee coming right after that. And you
better believe that the incumbents and the Democratic establishment are
calling all of their corporate buddies to come save them.

But we are taking a bet on people, on all of you, on Justice Democrats’
supporters who believe in our candidates, who believe in the organization,
this ecosystem of support that we are building at Justice Democrats to
support the pipeline of working-class champions into the halls of
Congress. All it takes is $10, $20, whatever you got to keep this movement
going. We’d really appreciate your support. Thanks so much!"

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101092?refcode=em20220402-22686&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=22686%2E1203867%2EqFZslM ]Watch & Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1006&akid=22686%2E1203867%2EqFZslM ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1007&akid=22686%2E1203867%2EqFZslM ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220402-22686-footer&t=1008&refcode2=22686_1203867_qFZslM&akid=22686%2E1203867%2EqFZslM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1009&akid=22686%2E1203867%2EqFZslM

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9e4d47b77f1f405f9aacf377a787ea68&_e=N6MAdf4hbIHQ3rKU1tg-osrIsU5WJhweDdGz-m5qGQwOF0SrRY3gwDLVDKNXHNWHP9WBUxB522KC7KP0wufqrqCRsMVOgiLz4qdw9bjsPwaGmneEnQg3vrRQ1Bizq6mDBcfCxk9DP9xt9HkJMnykhCQ9M4BxeZ3Est2NKXAySahKupDxy0HqQ6yh3AqTQvika851WYHQJ-bNxUOf6Ky17J5N4iwgWHRR03JJwrNSrMip8UPaJYMT0QZiRb0Cm3dY9ACAIR1PMZtSo4Apy7YJyuEFvGoMgRNhRFy4TsZTsfvJiG2MDWbrVCsAiXUOqX0fjA33Ptk4AVbovAjhJ35zKmfSp1lnCWCkIJkdDyLdJStlcJCQDS8T0OoY5mlKj9xzvZdYgY5ji1nS9M5_PRJkYD5ClSlRj540wWKvUFWMivPvN2XawrOF12kaHP9K5qFIE_2liJ7dW9sUAmlcHKSeAg%3D%3D)

Peter -

Have you seen the polls in our Senate race lately? _It's VERY tight._

RealClearPolitics.com averages every public poll that is done for a particular race and puts out what is known as the "RCP Average" - a term every campaign staffer and reporter knows well because it indicates trends in a race.

Please see below for the RCP average in OUR race:

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9e4d47b77f1f405f9aacf377a787ea68&_e=N6MAdf4hbIHQ3rKU1tg-osrIsU5WJhweDdGz-m5qGQwOF0SrRY3gwDLVDKNXHNWHP9WBUxB522KC7KP0wufqrqCRsMVOgiLz4qdw9bjsPwaGmneEnQg3vrRQ1Bizq6mDBcfCxk9DP9xt9HkJMnykhCQ9M4BxeZ3Est2NKXAySahKupDxy0HqQ6yh3AqTQvika851WYHQJ-bNxUOf6Ky17J5N4iwgWHRR03JJwrNSrMip8UPaJYMT0QZiRb0Cm3dYwBOltFpm3KOwgpfOnTyMVPOm4fdOsHEHpVMuRAZL2P6v1QJQhu91nTqy1tbylTrjVuTJefWV_s-BZYP4BBf87EqAncwWfGzCXMQcXdEvMsxE8CdihphoMknpnuYgre7HfvFu75vzNecRx4aau45bS49LCSG9f0QemCcLR0bnvcj97r1VruZld3nn2BdV8Rm0EKPyL0lM0oS4avtcBBaqZg%3D%3D)

clean_body: If you average all the recent polls in the Georgia Senate race, Team Herschel is up by one point. We need your help to stay ahead and expand our lead. | Peter - Have you seen the polls in our Senate race lately? It's VERY tight. RealClearPolitics.com averages every public poll that is done for a particular race and puts out what is known as the "RCP Average" - a term every campaign staffer and reporter knows well because it indicates trends in a race. Please see below for the RCP average in OUR race: As you can see, we're up over our opponent on average by ONE POINT. We're asking for just $1 today to help us expand our +1-point polling average lead in the Georgia Senate race. Thanks, Team Herschel | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6hhb5kqt71bglu0ck0kp586c1mcaq387sm9c480_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqn8pb46dpbcpdiesq62tjnmjgjadj6mlr72p31euor0sb56pq79pdjcljrcorn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti61j75cljcgrrcob662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5ge9pj5c1i68oh5u)
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqljtb71ft8ne40slk3go0oh2fpe4dcdja66vo5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjj6ao34chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqgdiubrpf9v14euc30dp565ni56hnuo6gep1li8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjj6ao34chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zlnllkuarh7cg3g2qsobifub3753mg9q67iu93ig_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjj6ao34chh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: Appalling data
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, You’d think a pandemic would be a good time to pass Medicare for All. But no, Congress won’t even vote on Medicare for All, much less pass it. [_Help me fight for Medicare for All by donating here._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43715888/338376226/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjYzMzkwMS1kMGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IYVpxxEwThDhDLduEGyuepimgF2izsWJoHmcfK-5Er4=) Did you know that Johns Hopkins data shows that 1/3 of Covid deaths have been due to lack of healthcare? That’s over 300,000 people. And during non-pandemic years, 68,000 people die every year because they don’t have healthcare. Millions more people skip medical care because they can’t afford it, even _with_ health insurance. It’s clear we need Medicare for All, and we need people in Congress with the courage to fight for it. I’ve risked arrest occupying empty buildings to get Emergency Pandemic Housing for homeless people, and I will keep taking the necessary risks in the fight for Medicare for All. [**Unlike my corporate opponent, I don’t take any healthcare or big pharma money, so I need your help instead. Can you set up a $5 monthly donation right now to help me clean_body: | | | Hi there, You’d think a pandemic would be a good time to pass Medicare for All. But no, Congress won’t even vote on Medicare for All, much less pass it. = Did you know that Johns Hopkins data shows that 1/3 of Covid deaths have been due to lack of healthcare? That’s over 300,000 people. And during non-pandemic years, 68,000 people die every year because they don’t have healthcare. Millions more people skip medical care because they can’t afford it, even with health insurance. It’s clear we need Medicare for All, and we need people in Congress with the courage to fight for it. I’ve risked arrest occupying empty buildings to get Emergency Pandemic Housing for homeless people, and I will keep taking the necessary risks in the fight for Medicare for All. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411 | | Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States | | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Team, in one of the most vital election years on record, we just got slammed with another fundraising blackout – and it’s our end-of-quarter deadline. My campaign manager brain is going nuts. 🤯
Robust campaign finance reforms are critical, and we fully support them, but the reality is it sets us back this year. We have to hit every finance goal every quarter, especially in an on-year. We lost January and most of February. Now we’re about to experience another fundraising blackout, so we need to raise $10,000 in the next three days. That’ll hold us over till we can start fundraising again.
**[We’ve got 72 hours to raise about $4,200 more. WE CAN DO THIS. But we need YOU to help us out! In an election year where voter suppression legislation has massive support in state governments all over the country, we have to protect New Mexico as a haven for our democratic, constitutional right to vote. body:
When I was young...
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43716159/338377830/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk892-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWQ3NjFmMi1kMGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RdAB0HlXi61pkL2ZTRdD3FnlU0zl_PP8ZtQ9ArMPJQU=)Hi there, When I was young, I didn't think I would grow up to be the second woman in American history to be elected both Governor and Senator. But it has been the honor of my lifetime to represent Granite Staters. I ran for office to make sure everyone was counted in our country’s shared success. In the Senate, **I strive to make our democracy more inclusive and more accessible each and every day – and I'm dedicated to continuing this work.**

But here's the deal: **Mitch McConnell only has to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and I'm at the top of his list.** That's why GOP groups are doing whatever they can to beat me – spending over $7.5 million against me (more than they've spent against any other Senate Democrat), rallying out-of-state dark money groups, and recruiting extreme Republicans to run against me.

I hate asking for money, but I urgently need your help to win this November. [**So will you please rush $3 or whatever you can to help me defend this seat and protect Democrats' Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43716160/338377831/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk892-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWQ3NjFmMi1kMGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RdAB0HlXi61pkL2ZTRdD3FnlU0zl_PP8ZtQ9ArMPJQU=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: Team Benson Campaign Update!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
SENATOR MICHELLE BENSON ON NON-PROFITS FUNDED BY THE STATE IN THE MINNPOST | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=4c9314944d&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | Dear Fellow Republicans,

This week has been so energizing on the campaign trail meeting with folks across the Twin Cities. It’s clear to me: Republicans are ready for a change. I am the most principled, prepared, and electable candidate and am ready to serve on Day 1.
**SENATOR MICHELLE BENSON ON NON-PROFITS FUNDED BY THE STATE IN THE MINNPOST** Numerous non-profits are getting millions of your tax dollars from the State of Minnesota. I believe that these non-profits should be held accountable for how they spend our money. We have seen countless examples of waste, fraud, and abuse made by these organizations with some having excessive pay for their board members. Having friends at the Capitol or in Local Government should not entitle you to our tax money without proper oversight. The corruption and fraud must stop!

[https://www.minnpost.com/state-government/2022/04/gop-proposal-would-put-new-scrutiny-on-state-funded-nonprofits-in-minnesota/](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=c8d3e3c29f&e=9d6926af69)

---
|
---
| **OUTREACH AND CONVENTIONS**
The last few weeks have been full of balancing my commitment as a State Senator and meeting with so many of our great Republican grassroots leaders and delegates.

I enjoyed speaking with the delegates this week in SD46 on Monday. I spent the rest of the week looking forward to seeing everyone at the CD5 endorsing convention on Saturday, where we can continue our dialogue on how to make Tim Walz a one-term Governor!

---
|
---
| Wednesday there was a great turnout at the SD51 endorsing convention in Bloomington! Minnesotans across the state are ready for a new leader to make our state SAFER, BETTER, AND STRONGER.

---
|
---
| If we haven't connected by phone or in person yet, I look forward to it very soon! This weekend our campaign will be at congressional and endorsing conventions and I hope to see you there.

**Minnesotans Learns Something New About Michelle In A New Campaign Video**

Link to Video: [https://youtu.be/Jtq3UEWN8Kc](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=480ddd2c3a&e=9d6926af69)
---
|
---
|
**Virtual Townhall**
Team Benson hosted a virtual town hall meeting wit other GOP grassroots leaders. Attendees got answers to their questions, discussed our shared Republican priorities for Minnesota, and Michelle’s vision for the state.

**2022 Lincoln Reagan Dinner**
We had a fantastic evening with fellow Republicans, friends and family at the 2022 Lincoln Reagan Dinner! The room was buzzing with energy and we are confident that we are going to win up and down the ballot this year! #TeamBenson was thankful to be together! We are recharged and ready to meet with delegates Saturday!

---
|
---
| **Chip In To Help Michelle**
Every little bit helps! We have a long road to get through the endorsing convention in six weeks. If you can help please visit [https://secure.winred.com/michelle-for-minnesota/donate](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=d9b5306f92&e=9d6926af69)

**Thank you!**

In the meantime, please don’t hesitate to visit my website at [www.michelle4mn.com](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=3ed8dec344&e=9d6926af69) or to reach out via email: [michelle@michelle4mn.com](mailto:michelle@michelle4mn.com) or by phone at (612) 356-2256 if you have any questions or would like to volunteer to help my campaign.

Sincerely,

[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=762b138d15&e=9d6926af69)
Michelle Benson
[Candidate for Governor](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=74d03df921&e=9d6926af69).
---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=50a00762da&e=9d6926af69)
---

Friend, Thanks to you, we just closed out one of the most important months in this race to flip NM-02 blue. **Not only did we surpass our first end-of-quarter fundraising goal of 2022, but we officially made it onto the June 7 primary ballot with more than 80% of the vote at the State Democratic Party’s Pre-Primary Convention.** Plus, [we launched our online merch store](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43714080/338362746/1392561525?utm_source=fl_email_20220402ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODk5MTk5MC1iMGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_BtiHA1d-MtABvdDNgHUzcH6Nl_hVrbPnnF08Cv3kE=&emci=af7e6096-adb2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b8991990-b0b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4482565) so people like you can show your support when you’re out and about with a t-shirt, hat, button, and more! I truly can’t thank you enough for all you’ve done to make this grassroots campaign a success up to this point. Now, we’re just about two months away from the primary election, and with all the resources we’ve built over this first quarter, we’re going to get out into communities across the district and motivate voters to make their voices heard. I am so grateful to you, team. Now, let’s keep that momentum going to the primary and all the way to the general election in November! Mil gracias, Gabe PS — Recurring donations are a huge source of sustainable financial support for our campaign. Pitching in $5 or $10 every month goes such a long way, and will fuel us to the general when I go up against far-right Yvette Herrell. | | Peter, It’s hard to think about anything but tonight’s Final Four game between Carolina and Duke. We’re having some friends over and letting Calvin stay up to watch the game and I join the legions of Tar Heels fans who are basically holding our breath all day. But I did want to take a moment to say thank you. Setting big goals is always a risk. But since this was our last FEC deadline before the primary election, we knew we had to go for it. I am so thankful and excited to report that we surpassed our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal. Reaching this goal required our all (and then some), but because of grassroots supporters like you, we knew it was possible. Our primary election is _next month_ , and we have to continue connecting with voters in every corner of NC-11 before they head to the ballot box. We’ve made it through this race together so far, and with you by our side, winning is just over the horizon. clean_body: | = | | Peter, It’s hard to think about anything but tonight’s Final Four game between Carolina and Duke. name: Team Schiff
subject: You have to see it to believe it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=158%2E5257348%2EHG8-SC ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek, this is remarkable.

Adam’s critics and the cable news pundits don’t expect to see the kind of
energy at this point in the midterms that we're seeing right now. But we
have proof that grassroots Democrats are more fired up than ever to
protect Adam’s seat in Congress and our House majority.

We’re serious. Right now we're seeing our strongest showing of donations
over email... ever. You’ve got to see it to believe it.

Here’s a snapshot of just one hour before the FEC deadline closed:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_TYE_AC_20220402_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=158_5257348_HG8-SC&akid=158%2E5257348%2EHG8-SC ][IMG]

WOW!

Every single circle on this chart represents a person — not a lobbyist,
not a corporation, a person — who has Adam’s back against the relentless
right-wing attacks from Trump, McCarthy, and their Fox News cronies. And
it goes to show that you don’t need to contribute thousands of dollars to
make an impact on this campaign.

Not when so many people are acting together in solidarity for our
Democratic values. It's inspiring.

If you haven’t pitched in already, can you make a small contribution now
to help us get off to a fast start this month? Use this link:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_TYE_AC_20220402_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&refcode2=158_5257348_HG8-SC&akid=158%2E5257348%2EHG8-SC ]secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em

Here's the thing, Derek:

We’re running a truly people-powered campaign – comprised of individuals
from every corner of the country. Fueled by donations of $3, $15, and $25
at a time.

Meanwhile, Kevin McCarthy hosted a select group of deep-pocket donors at
the Trump Hotel in Washington and raised almost $10 million in a single
night.

With Republican Super PACs, billionaires, and special interest groups
willing to contribute whatever it takes to take back the House Majority,
we can’t afford to slow down now.

So what do you say, Derek?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_TYE_AC_20220402_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&refcode2=158_5257348_HG8-SC&akid=158%2E5257348%2EHG8-SC ]Pitch in a few bucks to join the tens of thousands of grassroots
Democrats supporting Adam’s campaign and our defense of our Democratic
House Majority in Washington. We need you with us if we’re going to keep
Kevin McCarthy out of the Speaker’s office.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_TYE_AC_20220402_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=3&t=1007&refcode2=158_5257348_HG8-SC&akid=158%2E5257348%2EHG8-SC ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_TYE_AC_20220402_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1009&refcode2=158_5257348_HG8-SC&akid=158%2E5257348%2EHG8-SC ]EXPRESS DONATE $25
